have hη_const : ∀ t, setup.η t = η := hη

    have h_step_ineq : ∀ t ω,
      2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ≤
      ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
      intro t ω
      have h_step : setup.process (t + 1) ω = setup.process t ω - setup.η t • setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) := by
        rw [SubgradientSetup.process_succ]
      rw [h_step, hη_const t]

      have h_norm_exp : ‖setup.process t ω - η • setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) - wStar‖ ^ 2 =
        ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ + η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
        calc
          ‖setup.process t ω - η • setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) - wStar‖ ^ 2
            = ‖(setup.process t ω - wStar) - η • setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
              rw [sub_sub, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm]
              congr 1
              abel
          _ = ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * ⟪setup.process t ω - wStar, η • setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)⟫ + ‖η • setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
            rw [norm_sub_eq_inner]
            simp [inner_comm]
          _ = ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪setup.process t ω - wStar, setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)⟫ + η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
            simp [inner_smul_right, norm_smul, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg (le_of_lt hη_pos)]
            ring
          _ = ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ + η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
            rw [inner_comm]

      have h_subgrad : f wStar ≥ f (setup.process t ω) + ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), wStar - setup.process t ω⟫ :=
        hsubgrad (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) wStar

      have h_inner : ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ ≥ f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar := by
        have : ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), wStar - setup.process t ω⟫ ≤ f wStar - f (setup.process t ω) := by linarith
        have : ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ = -⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), wStar - setup.process t ω⟫ := by
          rw [inner_sub, inner_comm]
          ring
        linarith

      calc
        2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar)
          ≤ 2 * η * ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ := by
            gcongr
            linarith [h_inner]
        _ = ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 -
            (‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ + η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) := by
          ring
        _ = ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 -
            ‖setup.process t ω - η • setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
          rw [h_norm_exp]
        _ = ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
          rw [show setup.process (t + 1) ω = setup.process t ω - η • setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) by
            rw [SubgradientSetup.process_succ, hη_const t]]

    have h_int_ineq : ∀ t,
      2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
      (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) + η ^ 2 * (∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
      intro t
      have h_pointwise : ∀ ω, 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ≤
        ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 :=
        fun ω => h_step_ineq t ω

      calc
        2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar)
          = ∫ ω, 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ∂setup.P := by
            rw [integral_sub (h_int_f t) (integrable_const _), integral_mul_left]
            congr 1
            ring
        _ ≤ ∫ ω, (‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P := by
          apply integral_mono setup.hP
          · apply Integrable.add
            · apply Integrable.sub h_int_norm_sq t h_int_norm_sq (t + 1)
            · apply Integrable.mul_const
              exact h_int_sq t
          · intro ω
            exact h_pointwise ω
        _ = (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) + η ^ 2 * (∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
          rw [integral_add, integral_sub h_int_norm_sq t h_int_norm_sq (t + 1), integral_mul_left]
          ring

    have h_sum :
      ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar)) ≤
      ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ((∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) +
      ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (η ^ 2 * (∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) := by
      calc
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar))
          ≤ ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ((∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) + η ^ 2 * (∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) := by
            apply Finset.sum_le_sum
            intro t _
            exact h_int_ineq t
        _ = ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ((∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) +
            ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (η ^ 2 * (∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) := by
          rw [Finset.sum_add_distrib]

    have h_telescope :
      ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ((∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) =
      (∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - (∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
      have : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ((∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) =
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
        rw [Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
      rw [this]

      have h_shift : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) =
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (T + 1), (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
        rw [Finset.sum_bij' (fun t _ => t + 1) (fun t _ => t - 1)]
        · intro t ht
          simp only [Finset.mem_Ico, Nat.succ_le_succ_iff, Nat.lt_succ_iff] at ht ⊢
          omega
        · intro t ht
          simp only [Finset.mem_Ico, Nat.succ_le_succ_iff, Nat.lt_succ_iff] at ht ⊢
          omega
        · intro t ht
          simp only [Finset.mem_Ico, Nat.succ_le_succ_iff, Nat.lt_succ_iff] at ht ⊢
          omega
        · intro t ht
          simp only [Finset.mem_Ico, Nat.succ_le_succ_iff, Nat.lt_succ_iff] at ht ⊢
          omega
        · intro t ht
          simp only [Finset.mem_Ico, Nat.succ_le_succ_iff, Nat.lt_succ_iff] at ht ⊢
          omega
      rw [h_shift]

      have h_range : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) -
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (T + 1), (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) =
        (∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - (∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by

          _ = ((∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) + ∑ t ∈ Finset.Ico 1 T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) -
              (∑ t ∈ Finset.Ico 1 T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) + (∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) := by

theorem subgradient_convergence_convex
    (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {G η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hsubgrad : ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪setup.gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ)
    (hbounded : ∀ w s, ‖setup.gradL w s‖ ≤ G)
    (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hη : ∀ t, setup.η t = η)
    (T : ℕ) (hT : 0 < T)
    (h_int_f : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => f (setup.process t ω)) setup.P)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.P)
    (h_int_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.P) :
    (1 / (T : ℝ)) * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T,
        (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
      ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 / (2 * η * T) + η * G ^ 2 / 2 := by
  have hη_const : ∀ t, setup.η t = η := hη
  
  have h_step_ineq : ∀ t ω,
    2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ≤
    ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
    intro t ω
    have h_step : setup.process (t + 1) ω = setup.process t ω - setup.η t • setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) := by
      rw [SubgradientSetup.process_succ]
    rw [h_step, hη_const t]
    
    have h_norm_exp : ‖setup.process t ω - η • setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) - wStar‖ ^ 2 =
      ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ + η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
      calc
        ‖setup.process t ω - η • setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) - wStar‖ ^ 2
          = ‖(setup.process t ω - wStar) - η • setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
            rw [sub_sub, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm]
            congr 1
            abel
        _ = ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * ⟪setup.process t ω - wStar, η • setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)⟫ + ‖η • setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
          rw [norm_sub_eq_inner]
          simp [inner_comm]
        _ = ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪setup.process t ω - wStar, setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)⟫ + η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
          simp [inner_smul_right, norm_smul, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg (le_of_lt hη_pos)]
          ring
        _ = ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ + η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
          rw [inner_comm]
    
    have h_subgrad : f wStar ≥ f (setup.process t ω) + ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), wStar - setup.process t ω⟫ :=

    have h_inner : ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ ≥ f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar := by
      have : ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), wStar - setup.process t ω⟫ ≤ f wStar - f (setup.process t ω) := by linarith
      have : ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ = -⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), wStar - setup.process t ω⟫ := by
        rw [inner_sub, inner_comm]
        ring
      linarith
    
    calc
      2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar)
        ≤ 2 * η * ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ := by
          gcongr
          linarith [h_inner]
      _ = ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 -
          (‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ + η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) := by
        ring
      _ = ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 -
          ‖setup.process t ω - η • setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
        rw [h_norm_exp]
      _ = ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
        rw [show setup.process (t + 1) ω = setup.process t ω - η • setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) by
          rw [SubgradientSetup.process_succ, hη_const t]]
  
  have h_int_ineq : ∀ t,
    2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
    (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) + η ^ 2 * (∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by

    have h_pointwise : ∀ ω, 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ≤

      fun ω => h_step_ineq t ω
    
    calc
      2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar)
        = ∫ ω, 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ∂setup.P := by
          rw [integral_sub (h_int_f t) (integrable_const _), integral_mul_left]
          congr 1
          ring
      _ ≤ ∫ ω, (‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P := by
        apply integral_mono setup.hP
        · apply Integrable.add
          · apply Integrable.sub h_int_norm_sq t h_int_norm_sq (t + 1)
          · apply Integrable.mul_const
            exact h_int_sq t
        · intro ω
          exact h_pointwise ω
      _ = (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) + η ^ 2 * (∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
        rw [integral_add, integral_sub h_int_norm_sq t h_int_norm_sq (t + 1), integral_mul_left]
        ring
  
  have h_sum :
    ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar)) ≤
    ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ((∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) +
    ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (η ^ 2 * (∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) := by
    calc
      ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar))
        ≤ ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ((∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) + η ^ 2 * (∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) := by
          apply Finset.sum_le_sum
          intro t _
          exact h_int_ineq t
      _ = ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ((∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) +
          ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (η ^ 2 * (∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) := by
        rw [Finset.sum_add_distrib]
  
  have h_telescope :
    ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ((∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) =

    rw [this]

        _ = (∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) -
            (∑ t ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (T + 1), (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) := by rfl
        _ = ((∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) + ∑ t ∈ Finset.Ico 1 T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) -
            (∑ t ∈ Finset.Ico 1 T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) + (∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) := by
          have h1 : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) =
            (∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) + ∑ t ∈ Finset.Ico 1 T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
            rw [Finset.sum_range_succ']
            simp
          have h2 : ∑ t ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (T + 1), (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) =
            ∑ t ∈ Finset.Ico 1 T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) + (∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
            rw [Finset.sum_Ico_succ_top (by omega)]

full_code:
import Main
import Lib.Glue.Algebra
import Lib.Glue.Probability
import Lib.Layer0.IndepExpect

/-!
# Stochastic Subgradient Method — Convex Non-Smooth Optimization (Primitive Form)

Layer: 2 (concrete algorithm proof with novel structure)

CRITICAL CORRECTION: Removed all abstract subdifferential symbols per Principle A.
Replaced with primitive inequality form: ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ
This avoids invented symbols and matches Mathlib's primitive requirements.

Archetype B — novel proof structure bypassing Layer 1 meta-theorems due to:
- Absence of gradF/unbiasedness hypotheses
- Direct use of primitive subgradient inequality in pointwise bound
- Variance bound derived internally from uniform oracle bound (Pattern I)

Proof chain (convex case, constant η):
1. Pointwise norm expansion via `norm_sq_sgd_step`
2. Primitive subgradient inequality: f(wₜ) - f(w*) ≤ ⟪gₜ, wₜ - w*⟫ (direct quantifier form)
3. Substitute inequality into expansion
4. Integrate + linearity
5. Bounded oracle → variance bound via Pattern I
6. Telescope sum + algebraic rearrangement

Design compliance:
- Convention §1: Variance bound derived internally with explicit integrability
- Convention §2: hgL stored in structure (weakest measurability level)
- Convention §4: All lemmas include Used in: tags
- Convention §5: NOT APPLICABLE (uniform oracle bound)

Used in: main convergence result for non-smooth convex stochastic optimization
-/

open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
open scoped InnerProductSpace

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

-- ============================================================================
-- SubgradientSetup: NO gradF field (non-smooth objective)
-- ============================================================================
/-- Complete setup for stochastic subgradient method.
Critical distinction: contains NO `gradF` field (non-smooth objective has no gradient).
Includes oracle measurability `hgL` as structure field (Convention §2). -/
structure SubgradientSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  w₀ : E
  η : ℕ → ℝ
  gradL : E → S → E
  ξ : ℕ → Ω → S
  P : Measure Ω
  hP : IsProbabilityMeasure P
  hξ_meas : ∀ t, Measurable (ξ t)
  hξ_indep : iIndepFun (β := fun _ => S) ξ P
  hξ_ident : ∀ t, IdentDistrib (ξ t) (ξ 0) P P
  hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry gradL)

/-- Self-contained recursive process definition for subgradient method (Archetype B). -/
noncomputable def SubgradientSetup.process (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω) : ℕ → Ω → E
  | 0 => fun _ => setup.w₀
  | t + 1 => fun ω => 
      let w_t := process setup t ω
      w_t - setup.η t • setup.gradL w_t (setup.ξ t ω)

namespace SubgradientSetup

variable (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω)

@[simp]
theorem process_zero : process setup 0 = fun _ => setup.w₀ := by
  sorry
@[simp]
theorem process_succ (t : ℕ) : process setup (t + 1) = fun ω => process setup t ω - setup.η t • setup.gradL (process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) := by
  sorry

end SubgradientSetup

-- ============================================================================
-- Convergence theorem (PRIMITIVE FORM — NO abstract subdifferential symbols)
-- ============================================================================
/-- Convex convergence for stochastic subgradient method (primitive inequality form).
Archetype B: novel proof structure bypassing Layer 1 meta-theorems.
Uses primitive subgradient condition: ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ
Derives variance bound internally from uniform oracle bound (Pattern I).
Used in: main result for non-smooth convex stochastic optimization (this file) -/
theorem subgradient_convergence_convex
    (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {G η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    -- PRIMITIVE SUBGRADIENT CONDITION (replaces abstract subdifferential membership):
    (hsubgrad : ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪setup.gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ)
    (hbounded : ∀ w s, ‖setup.gradL w s‖ ≤ G)
    (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hη : ∀ t, setup.η t = η)
    (T : ℕ) (hT : 0 < T)
    (h_int_f : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => f (setup.process t ω)) setup.P)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.P)
    (h_int_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.P) :
    (1 / (T : ℝ)) * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T,
        (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
      ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 / (2 * η * T) + η * G ^ 2 / 2 := by
  have hη_const : ∀ t, setup.η t = η := hη

    have h_step_ineq : ∀ t ω,
      2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ≤
      ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
      intro t ω
      have h_step : setup.process (t + 1) ω = setup.process t ω - setup.η t • setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) := by
        rw [SubgradientSetup.process_succ]
      rw [h_step, hη_const t]

      have h_norm_exp : ‖setup.process t ω - η • setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) - wStar‖ ^ 2 =
        ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ + η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
        calc
          ‖setup.process t ω - η • setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) - wStar‖ ^ 2
            = ‖(setup.process t ω - wStar) - η • setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
              rw [sub_sub, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm]
              congr 1
              abel
          _ = ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * ⟪setup.process t ω - wStar, η • setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)⟫ + ‖η • setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
            rw [norm_sub_eq_inner]
            simp [inner_comm]
          _ = ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪setup.process t ω - wStar, setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)⟫ + η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
            simp [inner_smul_right, norm_smul, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg (le_of_lt hη_pos)]
            ring
          _ = ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ + η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
            rw [inner_comm]

      have h_subgrad : f wStar ≥ f (setup.process t ω) + ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), wStar - setup.process t ω⟫ :=
        hsubgrad (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) wStar

      have h_inner : ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ ≥ f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar := by
        have : ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), wStar - setup.process t ω⟫ ≤ f wStar - f (setup.process t ω) := by linarith
        have : ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ = -⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), wStar - setup.process t ω⟫ := by
          rw [inner_sub, inner_comm]
          ring
        linarith

      calc
        2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar)
          ≤ 2 * η * ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ := by
            gcongr
            linarith [h_inner]
        _ = ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 -
            (‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process t ω - wStar⟫ + η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) := by
          ring
        _ = ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 -
            ‖setup.process t ω - η • setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
          rw [h_norm_exp]
        _ = ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
          rw [show setup.process (t + 1) ω = setup.process t ω - η • setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) by
            rw [SubgradientSetup.process_succ, hη_const t]]

    have h_int_ineq : ∀ t,
      2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
      (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) + η ^ 2 * (∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
      intro t
      have h_pointwise : ∀ ω, 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ≤
        ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 :=
        fun ω => h_step_ineq t ω

      calc
        2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar)
          = ∫ ω, 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ∂setup.P := by
            rw [integral_sub (h_int_f t) (integrable_const _), integral_mul_left]
            congr 1
            ring
        _ ≤ ∫ ω, (‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P := by
          apply integral_mono setup.hP
          · apply Integrable.add
            · apply Integrable.sub h_int_norm_sq t h_int_norm_sq (t + 1)
            · apply Integrable.mul_const
              exact h_int_sq t
          · intro ω
            exact h_pointwise ω
        _ = (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) + η ^ 2 * (∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
          rw [integral_add, integral_sub h_int_norm_sq t h_int_norm_sq (t + 1), integral_mul_left]
          ring

    have h_sum :
      ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar)) ≤
      ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ((∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) +
      ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (η ^ 2 * (∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) := by
      calc
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar))
          ≤ ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ((∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) + η ^ 2 * (∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) := by
            apply Finset.sum_le_sum
            intro t _
            exact h_int_ineq t
        _ = ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ((∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) +
            ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (η ^ 2 * (∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) := by
          rw [Finset.sum_add_distrib]

    have h_telescope :
      ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ((∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) =
      (∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - (∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
      have : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ((∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) =
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
        rw [Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
      rw [this]

      have h_shift : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) =
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (T + 1), (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
        rw [Finset.sum_bij' (fun t _ => t + 1) (fun t _ => t - 1)]
        · intro t ht
          simp only [Finset.mem_Ico, Nat.succ_le_succ_iff, Nat.lt_succ_iff] at ht ⊢
          omega
        · intro t ht
          simp only [Finset.mem_Ico, Nat.succ_le_succ_iff, Nat.lt_succ_iff] at ht ⊢
          omega
        · intro t ht
          simp only [Finset.mem_Ico, Nat.succ_le_succ_iff, Nat.lt_succ_iff] at ht ⊢
          omega
        · intro t ht
          simp only [Finset.mem_Ico, Nat.succ_le_succ_iff, Nat.lt_succ_iff] at ht ⊢
          omega
        · intro t ht
          simp only [Finset.mem_Ico, Nat.succ_le_succ_iff, Nat.lt_succ_iff] at ht ⊢
          omega
      rw [h_shift]

      have h_range : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) -
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (T + 1), (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) =
        (∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - (∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
        calc
          _ = (∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) -
              (∑ t ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (T + 1), (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) := by rfl
          _ = ((∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) + ∑ t ∈ Finset.Ico 1 T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) -
              (∑ t ∈ Finset.Ico 1 T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) + (∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) := by
            have h1 : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) =
              (∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) + ∑ t ∈ Finset.Ico 1 T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
              rw [Finset.sum_range_succ']
              simp
            have h2 : ∑ t ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (T + 1), (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) =
              ∑ t ∈ Finset.Ico 1 T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) + (∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
              rw [Finset.sum_Ico_succ_top (by omega)]
            rw [h1, h2]
          _ = (∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - (∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
            abel
      rw [h_range]

    have h_grad_bound : ∀ t, (∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2

proof_code:
let w : ℕ → Ω → E := setup.process
    let g : ℕ → Ω → E := fun t ω => setup.gradL (w t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)
    have h_step : ∀ t ω,
        ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ≤ ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 
          - 2 * η * (f (w t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by
      intro t ω
      have h1 : w (t + 1) ω = w t ω - η • g t ω := by
        simp [w, g, SubgradientSetup.process_succ, hη]
        <;> ring
      rw [h1]
      calc
        ‖w t ω - η • g t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 
          = ‖(w t ω - wStar) - η • g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by rw [sub_sub]
        _ = ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * ⟪η • g t ω, w t ω - wStar⟫_ℝ + ‖η • g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by
          rw [norm_sub_sq_real]
        _ = ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪g t ω, w t ω - wStar⟫_ℝ + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by
          simp [inner_smul_left, norm_smul, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_of_nonneg (le_of_lt hη_pos)]
          <;> ring
        _ ≤ ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * (f (w t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by
          have h2 : f wStar ≥ f (w t ω) + ⟪g t ω, wStar - w t ω⟫_ℝ := 
            hsubgrad (w t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) wStar
          have h3 : ⟪g t ω, wStar - w t ω⟫_ℝ = -⟪g t ω, w t ω - wStar⟫_ℝ := by
            rw [inner_sub_left]
            <;> simp [inner_comm]
            <;> ring
          have h4 : f (w t ω) - f wStar ≤ ⟪g t ω, w t ω - wStar⟫_ℝ := by linarith
          have h5 : -2 * η * ⟪g t ω, w t ω - wStar⟫_ℝ ≤ -2 * η * (f (w t ω) - f wStar) := by
            nlinarith [hη_pos]
          linarith
    have h_int_step : ∀ t,
        ∫ ω, ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤ 
        ∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P 
          - 2 * η * (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
      intro t
      have h1 : ∀ ω, ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ≤ ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 
          - 2 * η * (f (w t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 := h_step t
      have h2 : ∫ ω, ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤ 
          ∫ ω, (‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 
            - 2 * η * (f (w t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P := by
        apply integral_mono setup.P
        · exact h_int_norm_sq (t + 1)
        · intro ω
          exact h1 ω
      have h3 : ∫ ω, (‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 
            - 2 * η * (f (w t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P = 
          ∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P 
            - 2 * η * (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
        have h4 : Integrable (fun ω => ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.P := h_int_norm_sq t
        have h5 : Integrable (fun ω => f (w t ω)) setup.P := h_int_f t
        have h6 : Integrable (fun ω => ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2) setup.P := h_int_sq t
        calc
          ∫ ω, (‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 
            - 2 * η * (f (w t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P
            = ∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P 
              + ∫ ω, (-2 * η * (f (w t ω) - f wStar)) ∂setup.P 
              + ∫ ω, (η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P := by
            rw [integral_add h4]
            rw [integral_add (integrable_sub h5 (integrable_const _))]
          _ = ∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P 
              - 2 * η * (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
            simp [integral_smul, integral_sub, h5, integrable_const]
            <;> ring
      rw [h3] at h2
      exact h2
    have h_sum_ineq : 
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) ≤ 
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P 
          - 2 * η * (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
      apply Finset.sum_le_sum
      intro t ht
      exact h_int_step t
    have h_telescope : 
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) = 
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) 
          - ∫ ω, ‖w 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + ∫ ω, ‖w T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
      calc
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) 
          = ∑ t ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (T + 1), ∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
            apply Finset.sum_bij' (fun t _ => t + 1) (fun t _ => t - 1)
            · intro t ht; simp [Finset.mem_Ico] at ht ⊢; omega
            · intro t ht; simp [Finset.mem_Ico] at ht ⊢; omega
            · intro t ht; simp
            · intro t ht; simp [Finset.mem_Ico] at ht ⊢; omega
            · intro t ht; simp
        _ = ∑ t ∈ Finset.range (T + 1), ∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P 
            - ∫ ω, ‖w 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
            rw [Finset.sum_Ico_eq_sum_range_succ]
            <;> simp [Finset.sum_range_succ]
        _ = (∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P 
            + ∫ ω, ‖w T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - ∫ ω, ‖w 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
            rw [Finset.sum_range_succ]
        _ = ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) 
            - ∫ ω, ‖w 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + ∫ ω, ‖w T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
            ring
    have h_sum_expand : 
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P 
          - 2 * η * (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) = 
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P 
          - 2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) 
          + η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
      simp [Finset.sum_add_distrib, Finset.sum_sub_distrib, Finset.mul_sum]
    have h_combined : 
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) ≤ 
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P 
          - 2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) 
          + η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
      rw [h_sum_expand] at h_sum_ineq
      exact h_sum_ineq
    have h_telescoped : 
        ∫ ω, ‖w 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖w T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤ 
        -2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) 
          + η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
      linarith [h_telescope, h_combined]
    have h_grad_bound : ∀ t, ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤ G ^ 2 := by
      intro t
      have h1 : ∀ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ≤ G ^ 2 := by
        intro ω
        have h2 : ‖g t ω‖ ≤ G := hbounded (w t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)
        have h3 : 0 ≤ ‖g t ω‖ := norm_nonneg _
        have h4 : 0 ≤ G := by
          have h5 : ‖g t ω‖ ≤ G := hbounded (w t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)
          linarith
        nlinarith
      have h2 : ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤ ∫ ω, G ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
        apply integral_mono setup.P
        · exact h_int_sq t
        · intro ω
          exact h1 ω
      have h3 : ∫ ω, G ^ 2 ∂setup.P = G ^ 2 := by
        simp [setup.hP]
      rw [h3] at h2
      exact h2
    have h_sum_grad : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤ T * G ^ 2 := by
      calc
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤ ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, G ^ 2 := by
          apply Finset.sum_le_sum
          intro t ht
          exact h_grad_bound t
        _ = T * G ^ 2 := by
          simp [Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]
    have h_w0_const : ∫ ω, ‖w 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P = ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
      simp [w, SubgradientSetup.process_zero]
      rw [integral_const setup.P]
      <;> simp [setup.hP]
    have h_wT_nonneg : 0 ≤ ∫ ω, ‖w T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
      apply integral_nonneg
      intro ω
      exact sq_nonneg _
    have h_main_ineq : 
        2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤ 
        ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * (T * G ^ 2) := by
      have h1 : ∫ ω, ‖w 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖w T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤ 
          -2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) 
            + η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := h_telescoped
      have h2 : -2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≥ 
          ∫ ω, ‖w 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖w T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P 
            - η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by linarith
      have h3 : 2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤ 
          ∫ ω, ‖w T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖w 0 ω - w

theorem subgradient_convergence_convex
    (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {G η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hsubgrad : ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪setup.gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ)
    (hbounded : ∀ w s, ‖setup.gradL w s‖ ≤ G)
    (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hη : ∀ t, setup.η t = η)
    (T : ℕ) (hT : 0 < T)
    (h_int_f : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => f (setup.process t ω)) setup.P)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.P)
    (h_int_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.P) :
    (1 / (T : ℝ)) * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T,
        (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
      ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 / (2 * η * T) + η * G ^ 2 / 2 := by
  let w : ℕ → Ω → E := setup.process
  let g : ℕ → Ω → E := fun t ω => setup.gradL (w t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)
  have h_step : ∀ t ω,
      ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ≤ ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 
        - 2 * η * (f (w t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by
    intro t ω
    have h1 : w (t + 1) ω = w t ω - η • g t ω := by
      simp [w, g, SubgradientSetup.process_succ, hη]
      <;> ring
    rw [h1]
    calc
      ‖w t ω - η • g t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 
        = ‖(w t ω - wStar) - η • g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by rw [sub_sub]
      _ = ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * ⟪η • g t ω, w t ω - wStar⟫_ℝ + ‖η • g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by
        rw [norm_sub_sq_real]
      _ = ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪g t ω, w t ω - wStar⟫_ℝ + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by
        simp [inner_smul_left, norm_smul, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_of_nonneg (le_of_lt hη_pos)]
        <;> ring
      _ ≤ ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * (f (w t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by
        have h2 : f wStar ≥ f (w t ω) + ⟪g t ω, wStar - w t ω⟫_ℝ := 
          hsubgrad (w t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) wStar
        have h3 : ⟪g t ω, wStar - w t ω⟫_ℝ = -⟪g t ω, w t ω - wStar⟫_ℝ := by
          rw [inner_sub_left]
          <;> simp [inner_comm]
          <;> ring
        have h4 : f (w t ω) - f wStar ≤ ⟪g t ω, w t ω - wStar⟫_ℝ := by linarith
        have h5 : -2 * η * ⟪g t ω, w t ω - wStar⟫_ℝ ≤ -2 * η * (f (w t ω) - f wStar) := by
          nlinarith [hη_pos]
        linarith
  have h_int_step : ∀ t,
      ∫ ω, ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤ 
      ∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P 
        - 2 * η * (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
    intro t
    have h1 : ∀ ω, ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ≤ ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 
        - 2 * η * (f (w t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 := h_step t
    have h2 : ∫ ω, ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤ 
        ∫ ω, (‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 
          - 2 * η * (f (w t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P := by
      apply integral_mono setup.P
      · exact h_int_norm_sq (t + 1)
      · intro ω
        exact h1 ω
    have h3 : ∫ ω, (‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 
          - 2 * η * (f (w t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P = 
        ∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P 
          - 2 * η * (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
      have h4 : Integrable (fun ω => ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.P := h_int_norm_sq t
      have h5 : Integrable (fun ω => f (w t ω)) setup.P := h_int_f t
      have h6 : Integrable (fun ω => ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2) setup.P := h_int_sq t
      calc
        ∫ ω, (‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 
          - 2 * η * (f (w t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P
          = ∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P 
            + ∫ ω, (-2 * η * (f (w t ω) - f wStar)) ∂setup.P 
            + ∫ ω, (η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P := by
          rw [integral_add h4]
          rw [integral_add (integrable_sub h5 (integrable_const _))]
        _ = ∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P 
            - 2 * η * (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
          simp [integral_smul, integral_sub, h5, integrable_const]
          <;> ring
    rw [h3] at h2
    exact h2
  have h_sum_ineq : 
      ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) ≤ 
      ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P 
        - 2 * η * (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
    apply Finset.sum_le_sum
    intro t ht
    exact h_int_step t
  have h_telescope : 
      ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) = 
      ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) 
        - ∫ ω, ‖w 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + ∫ ω, ‖w T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
    calc
      ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) 
        = ∑ t ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (T + 1), ∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
          apply Finset.sum_bij' (fun t _ => t + 1) (fun t _ => t - 1)
          · intro t ht; simp [Finset.mem_Ico] at ht ⊢; omega
          · intro t ht; simp [Finset.mem_Ico] at ht ⊢; omega
          · intro t ht; simp
          · intro t ht; simp [Finset.mem_Ico] at ht ⊢; omega
          · intro t ht; simp
      _ = ∑ t ∈ Finset.range (T + 1), ∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P 
          - ∫ ω, ‖w 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
          rw [Finset.sum_Ico_eq_sum_range_succ]
          <;> simp [Finset.sum_range_succ]
      _ = (∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P 
          + ∫ ω, ‖w T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - ∫ ω, ‖w 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
          rw [Finset.sum_range_succ]
      _ = ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) 
          - ∫ ω, ‖w 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + ∫ ω, ‖w T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
          ring
  have h_sum_expand : 
      ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P 
        - 2 * η * (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) = 
      ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P 
        - 2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) 
        + η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
    simp [Finset.sum_add_distrib, Finset.sum_sub_distrib, Finset.mul_sum]
  have h_combined : 
      ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) ≤ 
      ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P 
        - 2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) 
        + η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
    rw [h_sum_expand] at h_sum_ineq
    exact h_sum_ineq
  have h_telescoped : 
      ∫ ω, ‖w 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖w T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤ 
      -2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar)

    linarith [h_telescope, h_combined]
  have h_grad_bound : ∀ t, ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤ G ^ 2 := by
    intro t

full_code:
import Main
import Lib.Glue.Algebra
import Lib.Glue.Probability
import Lib.Layer0.IndepExpect

/-!
# Stochastic Subgradient Method — Convex Non-Smooth Optimization (Primitive Form)

Layer: 2 (concrete algorithm proof with novel structure)

CRITICAL CORRECTION: Removed all abstract subdifferential symbols per Principle A.
Replaced with primitive inequality form: ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ
This avoids invented symbols and matches Mathlib's primitive requirements.

Archetype B — novel proof structure bypassing Layer 1 meta-theorems due to:
- Absence of gradF/unbiasedness hypotheses
- Direct use of primitive subgradient inequality in pointwise bound
- Variance bound derived internally from uniform oracle bound (Pattern I)

Proof chain (convex case, constant η):
1. Pointwise norm expansion via `norm_sq_sgd_step`
2. Primitive subgradient inequality: f(wₜ) - f(w*) ≤ ⟪gₜ, wₜ - w*⟫ (direct quantifier form)
3. Substitute inequality into expansion
4. Integrate + linearity
5. Bounded oracle → variance bound via Pattern I
6. Telescope sum + algebraic rearrangement

Design compliance:
- Convention §1: Variance bound derived internally with explicit integrability
- Convention §2: hgL stored in structure (weakest measurability level)
- Convention §4: All lemmas include Used in: tags
- Convention §5: NOT APPLICABLE (uniform oracle bound)

Used in: main convergence result for non-smooth convex stochastic optimization
-/

open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
open scoped InnerProductSpace

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

-- ============================================================================
-- SubgradientSetup: NO gradF field (non-smooth objective)
-- ============================================================================
/-- Complete setup for stochastic subgradient method.
Critical distinction: contains NO `gradF` field (non-smooth objective has no gradient).
Includes oracle measurability `hgL` as structure field (Convention §2). -/
structure SubgradientSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  w₀ : E
  η : ℕ → ℝ
  gradL : E → S → E
  ξ : ℕ → Ω → S
  P : Measure Ω
  hP : IsProbabilityMeasure P
  hξ_meas : ∀ t, Measurable (ξ t)
  hξ_indep : iIndepFun (β := fun _ => S) ξ P
  hξ_ident : ∀ t, IdentDistrib (ξ t) (ξ 0) P P
  hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry gradL)

/-- Self-contained recursive process definition for subgradient method (Archetype B). -/
noncomputable def SubgradientSetup.process (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω) : ℕ → Ω → E
  | 0 => fun _ => setup.w₀
  | t + 1 => fun ω => 
      let w_t := process setup t ω
      w_t - setup.η t • setup.gradL w_t (setup.ξ t ω)

namespace SubgradientSetup

variable (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω)

@[simp]
theorem process_zero : process setup 0 = fun _ => setup.w₀ := by
  sorry
@[simp]
theorem process_succ (t : ℕ) : process setup (t + 1) = fun ω => process setup t ω - setup.η t • setup.gradL (process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) := by
  sorry

end SubgradientSetup

-- ============================================================================
-- Convergence theorem (PRIMITIVE FORM — NO abstract subdifferential symbols)
-- ============================================================================
/-- Convex convergence for stochastic subgradient method (primitive inequality form).
Archetype B: novel proof structure bypassing Layer 1 meta-theorems.
Uses primitive subgradient condition: ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ
Derives variance bound internally from uniform oracle bound (Pattern I).
Used in: main result for non-smooth convex stochastic optimization (this file) -/
theorem subgradient_convergence_convex
    (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {G η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    -- PRIMITIVE SUBGRADIENT CONDITION (replaces abstract subdifferential membership):
    (hsubgrad : ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪setup.gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ)
    (hbounded : ∀ w s, ‖setup.gradL w s‖ ≤ G)
    (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hη : ∀ t, setup.η t = η)
    (T : ℕ) (hT : 0 < T)
    (h_int_f : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => f (setup.process t ω)) setup.P)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.P)
    (h_int_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.P) :
    (1 / (T : ℝ)) * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T,
        (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
      ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 / (2 * η * T) + η * G ^ 2 / 2 := by
  let w : ℕ → Ω → E := setup.process
    let g : ℕ → Ω → E := fun t ω => setup.gradL (w t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)
    have h_step : ∀ t ω,
        ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ≤ ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 
          - 2 * η * (f (w t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by
      intro t ω
      have h1 : w (t + 1) ω = w t ω - η • g t ω := by
        simp [w, g, SubgradientSetup.process_succ, hη]
        <;> ring
      rw [h1]
      calc
        ‖w t ω - η • g t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 
          = ‖(w t ω - wStar) - η • g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by rw [sub_sub]
        _ = ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * ⟪η • g t ω, w t ω - wStar⟫_ℝ + ‖η • g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by
          rw [norm_sub_sq_real]
        _ = ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪g t ω, w t ω - wStar⟫_ℝ + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by
          simp [inner_smul_left, norm_smul, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_of_nonneg (le_of_lt hη_pos)]
          <;> ring
        _ ≤ ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * (f (w t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 := by
          have h2 : f wStar ≥ f (w t ω) + ⟪g t ω, wStar - w t ω⟫_ℝ := 
            hsubgrad (w t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) wStar
          have h3 : ⟪g t ω, wStar - w t ω⟫_ℝ = -⟪g t ω, w t ω - wStar⟫_ℝ := by
            rw [inner_sub_left]
            <;> simp [inner_comm]
            <;> ring
          have h4 : f (w t ω) - f wStar ≤ ⟪g t ω, w t ω - wStar⟫_ℝ := by linarith
          have h5 : -2 * η * ⟪g t ω, w t ω - wStar⟫_ℝ ≤ -2 * η * (f (w t ω) - f wStar) := by
            nlinarith [hη_pos]
          linarith
    have h_int_step : ∀ t,
        ∫ ω, ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤ 
        ∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P 
          - 2 * η * (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
      intro t
      have h1 : ∀ ω, ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ≤ ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 
          - 2 * η * (f (w t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 := h_step t
      have h2 : ∫ ω, ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤ 
          ∫ ω, (‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 
            - 2 * η * (f (w t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P := by
        apply integral_mono setup.P
        · exact h_int_norm_sq (t + 1)
        · intro ω
          exact h1 ω
      have h3 : ∫ ω, (‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 
            - 2 * η * (f (w t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P = 
          ∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P 
            - 2 * η * (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
        have h4 : Integrable (fun ω => ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.P := h_int_norm_sq t
        have h5 : Integrable (fun ω => f (w t ω)) setup.P := h_int_f t
        have h6 : Integrable (fun ω => ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2) setup.P := h_int_sq t
        calc
          ∫ ω, (‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 
            - 2 * η * (f (w t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P
            = ∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P 
              + ∫ ω, (-2 * η * (f (w t ω) - f wStar)) ∂setup.P 
              + ∫ ω, (η ^ 2 * ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P := by
            rw [integral_add h4]
            rw [integral_add (integrable_sub h5 (integrable_const _))]
          _ = ∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P 
              - 2 * η * (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
            simp [integral_smul, integral_sub, h5, integrable_const]
            <;> ring
      rw [h3] at h2
      exact h2
    have h_sum_ineq : 
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) ≤ 
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P 
          - 2 * η * (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
      apply Finset.sum_le_sum
      intro t ht
      exact h_int_step t
    have h_telescope : 
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) = 
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) 
          - ∫ ω, ‖w 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + ∫ ω, ‖w T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
      calc
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) 
          = ∑ t ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (T + 1), ∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
            apply Finset.sum_bij' (fun t _ => t + 1) (fun t _ => t - 1)
            · intro t ht; simp [Finset.mem_Ico] at ht ⊢; omega
            · intro t ht; simp [Finset.mem_Ico] at ht ⊢; omega
            · intro t ht; simp
            · intro t ht; simp [Finset.mem_Ico] at ht ⊢; omega
            · intro t ht; simp
        _ = ∑ t ∈ Finset.range (T + 1), ∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P 
            - ∫ ω, ‖w 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
            rw [Finset.sum_Ico_eq_sum_range_succ]
            <;> simp [Finset.sum_range_succ]
        _ = (∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P 
            + ∫ ω, ‖w T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) - ∫ ω, ‖w 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
            rw [Finset.sum_range_succ]
        _ = ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) 
            - ∫ ω, ‖w 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P + ∫ ω, ‖w T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
            ring
    have h_sum_expand : 
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P 
          - 2 * η * (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) = 
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P 
          - 2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) 
          + η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
      simp [Finset.sum_add_distrib, Finset.sum_sub_distrib, Finset.mul_sum]
    have h_combined : 
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖w (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) ≤ 
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖w t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P 
          - 2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) 
          + η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
      rw [h_sum_expand] at h_sum_ineq
      exact h_sum_ineq
    have h_telescoped : 
        ∫ ω, ‖w 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖w T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤ 
        -2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) 
          + η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
      linarith [h_telescope, h_combined]
    have h_grad_bound : ∀ t, ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤ G ^ 2 := by
      intro t
      have h1 : ∀ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ≤ G ^ 2 := by
        intro ω
        have h2 : ‖g t ω‖ ≤ G := hbounded (w t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)
        have h3 : 0 ≤ ‖g t ω‖ := norm_nonneg _
        have h4 : 0 ≤ G := by
          have h5 : ‖g t ω‖ ≤ G := hbounded (w t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)
          linarith
        nlinarith
      have h2 : ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤ ∫ ω, G ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
        apply integral_mono setup.P
        · exact h_int_sq t
        · intro ω
          exact h1 ω
      have h3 : ∫ ω, G ^ 2 ∂setup.P = G ^ 2 := by
        simp [setup.hP]
      rw [h3] at h2
      exact h2
    have h_sum_grad : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤ T * G ^ 2 := by
      calc
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤ ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, G ^ 2 := by
          apply Finset.sum_le_sum
          intro t ht
          exact h_grad_bound t
        _ = T * G ^ 2 := by
          simp [Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]
    have h_w0_const : ∫ ω, ‖w 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P = ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
      simp [w, SubgradientSetup.process_zero]
      rw [integral_const setup.P]
      <;> simp [setup.hP]
    have h_wT_nonneg : 0 ≤ ∫ ω, ‖w T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
      apply integral_nonneg
      intro ω
      exact sq_nonneg _
    have h_main_ineq : 
        2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤ 
        ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * (T * G ^ 2) := by
      have h1 : ∫ ω, ‖w 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖w T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤ 
          -2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) 
            + η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := h_telescoped
      have h2 : -2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≥ 
          ∫ ω, ‖w 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖w T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P 
            - η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖g t ω‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by linarith
      have h3 : 2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (w t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤ 
          ∫ ω, ‖w T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖w 0 ω - w

import Main
import Lib.Glue.Algebra
import Lib.Glue.Probability
import Lib.Layer0.IndepExpect

/-!
# Stochastic Subgradient Method — Convex Non-Smooth Optimization (Primitive Form)

Layer: 2 (concrete algorithm proof with novel structure)

CRITICAL CORRECTION: Removed all abstract subdifferential symbols per Principle A.
Replaced with primitive inequality form: ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ
This avoids invented symbols and matches Mathlib's primitive requirements.

Archetype B — novel proof structure bypassing Layer 1 meta-theorems due to:
- Absence of gradF/unbiasedness hypotheses
- Direct use of primitive subgradient inequality in pointwise bound
- Variance bound derived internally from uniform oracle bound (Pattern I)

Proof chain (convex case, constant η):
1. Pointwise norm expansion via `norm_sq_sgd_step`
2. Primitive subgradient inequality: f(wₜ) - f(w*) ≤ ⟪gₜ, wₜ - w*⟫ (direct quantifier form)
3. Substitute inequality into expansion
4. Integrate + linearity
5. Bounded oracle → variance bound via Pattern I
6. Telescope sum + algebraic rearrangement

Design compliance:
- Convention §1: Variance bound derived internally with explicit integrability
- Convention §2: hgL stored in structure (weakest measurability level)
- Convention §4: All lemmas include Used in: tags
- Convention §5: NOT APPLICABLE (uniform oracle bound)

Used in: main convergence result for non-smooth convex stochastic optimization
-/

open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
open scoped InnerProductSpace

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

-- ============================================================================
-- SubgradientSetup: NO gradF field (non-smooth objective)
-- ============================================================================
/-- Complete setup for stochastic subgradient method.
Critical distinction: contains NO `gradF` field (non-smooth objective has no gradient).
Includes oracle measurability `hgL` as structure field (Convention §2). -/
structure SubgradientSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  w₀ : E
  η : ℕ → ℝ
  gradL : E → S → E
  ξ : ℕ → Ω → S
  P : Measure Ω
  hP : IsProbabilityMeasure P
  hξ_meas : ∀ t, Measurable (ξ t)
  hξ_indep : iIndepFun (β := fun _ => S) ξ P
  hξ_ident : ∀ t, IdentDistrib (ξ t) (ξ 0) P P
  hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry gradL)

/-- Self-contained recursive process definition for subgradient method (Archetype B). -/
noncomputable def SubgradientSetup.process (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω) : ℕ → Ω → E
  | 0 => fun _ => setup.w₀
  | t + 1 => fun ω => 
      let w_t := process setup t ω
      w_t - setup.η t • setup.gradL w_t (setup.ξ t ω)

namespace SubgradientSetup

variable (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω)

@[simp]
theorem process_zero : process setup 0 = fun _ => setup.w₀ := by
  rfl

@[simp]
theorem process_succ (t : ℕ) : process setup (t + 1) = fun ω => process setup t ω - setup.η t • setup.gradL (process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) := by
  rfl

end SubgradientSetup

-- ============================================================================
-- Convergence theorem (PRIMITIVE FORM — NO abstract subdifferential symbols)
-- ============================================================================
/-- Convex convergence for stochastic subgradient method (primitive inequality form).
Archetype B: novel proof structure bypassing Layer 1 meta-theorems.
Uses primitive subgradient condition: ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ
Derives variance bound internally from uniform oracle bound (Pattern I).
Used in: main result for non-smooth convex stochastic optimization (this file) -/
theorem subgradient_convergence_convex
    (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {G η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    -- PRIMITIVE SUBGRADIENT CONDITION (replaces abstract subdifferential membership):
    (hsubgrad : ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪setup.gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ)
    (hbounded : ∀ w s, ‖setup.gradL w s‖ ≤ G)
    (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hη : ∀ t, setup.η t = η)
    (T : ℕ) (hT : 0 < T)
    (h_int_f : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => f (setup.process t ω)) setup.P)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.P)
    (h_int_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.P) :
    (1 / (T : ℝ)) * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T,
        (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
      ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 / (2 * η * T) + η * G ^ 2 / 2 := by
  have hG_nonneg : 0 ≤ G := by
    have := hbounded setup.w₀ (setup.ξ 0 (Classical.arbitrary Ω))
    exact norm_nonneg _
  
  have h_pointwise : ∀ t ω,
    2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ≤
    ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 +
    η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
    intro t ω
    let w_t := setup.process t ω
    let g_t := setup.gradL w_t (setup.ξ t ω)
    have h_step : setup.process (t + 1) ω = w_t - setup.η t • g_t := by
      rw [SubgradientSetup.process_succ]
    rw [h_step]
    have h_norm : ‖w_t - setup.η t • g_t - wStar‖ ^ 2 =
        ‖w_t - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * setup.η t * ⟪g_t, w_t - wStar⟫_ℝ +
        (setup.η t) ^ 2 * ‖g_t‖ ^ 2 := by
      calc
        ‖w_t - setup.η t • g_t - wStar‖ ^ 2 = ‖(w_t - wStar) - setup.η t • g_t‖ ^ 2 := by abel
        _ = ‖w_t - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * ⟪setup.η t • g_t, w_t - wStar⟫_ℝ + ‖setup.η t • g_t‖ ^ 2 := by
          rw [norm_sub_sq_real]
        _ = ‖w_t - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * setup.η t * ⟪g_t, w_t - wStar⟫_ℝ + (setup.η t) ^ 2 * ‖g_t‖ ^ 2 := by
          simp [inner_smul_left, norm_smul, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_of_nonneg (le_of_lt hη_pos)]
          <;> ring_nf
    have h_sub : f wStar ≥ f w_t + ⟪g_t, wStar - w_t⟫_ℝ := hsubgrad w_t (setup.ξ t ω) wStar
    have h_inner : ⟪g_t, w_t - wStar⟫_ℝ ≥ f w_t - f wStar := by
      have : ⟪g_t, wStar - w_t⟫_ℝ = -⟪g_t, w_t - wStar⟫_ℝ := by
        rw [inner_sub_left]
        simp [inner_comm]
        <;> ring_nf
      linarith
    calc
      2 * η * (f w_t - f wStar) ≤ 2 * η * ⟪g_t, w_t - wStar⟫_ℝ := by gcongr <;> linarith
      _ = 2 * setup.η t * ⟪g_t, w_t - wStar⟫_ℝ := by rw [hη t]
      _ = ‖w_t - wStar‖ ^ 2 + (setup.η t) ^ 2 * ‖g_t‖ ^ 2 - ‖w_t - setup.η t • g_t - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
        linarith [h_norm]
      _ = ‖w_t - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖w_t - setup.η t • g_t - wStar‖ ^ 2 + (setup.η t) ^ 2 * ‖g_t‖ ^ 2 := by ring
      _ = ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * ‖g_t‖ ^ 2 := by
        rw [h_step, hη t]
        <;> simp
        <;> ring
  
  have h_int_ineq : ∀ t,
    2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
    (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) -
    (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) +
    η ^ 2 * (∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
    intro t
    have h1 : Integrable (fun ω => f (setup.process t ω)) setup.P := h_int_f t
    have h2 : Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.P := h_int_norm_sq t
    have h3 : Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.P := h_int_norm_sq (t + 1)
    have h4 : Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.P := h_int_sq t
    have h5 : ∀ ω, 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ≤
        ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 +
        η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := h_pointwise t
    calc
      2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) =
          ∫ ω, 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ∂setup.P := by
        rw [mul_sub, ← integral_mul_left, ← integral_const setup.P (f wStar), integral_sub h1 (integrable_const _)]
        <;> simp
      _ ≤ ∫ ω, (‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 +
          η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P := by
        apply integral_mono_on setup.P (Set.univ : Set Ω)
        · exact h5
        · exact MeasurableSet.univ
        · intro ω hω; exact h5 ω
      _ = (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) -
          (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) +
          η ^ 2 * (∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
        rw [integral_add (Integrable.sub h2 h3) (Integrable.mul_const h4), integral_sub h2 h3, integral_mul_left]
        <;> ring
  
  have h_sum : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, 2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤

import Main
import Lib.Glue.Algebra
import Lib.Glue.Probability
import Lib.Layer0.IndepExpect

/-!
# Stochastic Subgradient Method — Convex Non-Smooth Optimization (Primitive Form)

Layer: 2 (concrete algorithm proof with novel structure)

CRITICAL CORRECTION: Removed all abstract subdifferential symbols per Principle A.
Replaced with primitive inequality form: ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ
This avoids invented symbols and matches Mathlib's primitive requirements.

Archetype B — novel proof structure bypassing Layer 1 meta-theorems due to:
- Absence of gradF/unbiasedness hypotheses
- Direct use of primitive subgradient inequality in pointwise bound
- Variance bound derived internally from uniform oracle bound (Pattern I)

Proof chain (convex case, constant η):
1. Pointwise norm expansion via `norm_sq_sgd_step`
2. Primitive subgradient inequality: f(wₜ) - f(w*) ≤ ⟪gₜ, wₜ - w*⟫ (direct quantifier form)
3. Substitute inequality into expansion
4. Integrate + linearity
5. Bounded oracle → variance bound via Pattern I
6. Telescope sum + algebraic rearrangement

Design compliance:
- Convention §1: Variance bound derived internally with explicit integrability
- Convention §2: hgL stored in structure (weakest measurability level)
- Convention §4: All lemmas include Used in: tags
- Convention §5: NOT APPLICABLE (uniform oracle bound)

Used in: main convergence result for non-smooth convex stochastic optimization
-/

open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
open scoped InnerProductSpace

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

-- ============================================================================
-- SubgradientSetup: NO gradF field (non-smooth objective)
-- ============================================================================
/-- Complete setup for stochastic subgradient method.
Critical distinction: contains NO `gradF` field (non-smooth objective has no gradient).
Includes oracle measurability `hgL` as structure field (Convention §2). -/
structure SubgradientSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  w₀ : E
  η : ℕ → ℝ
  gradL : E → S → E
  ξ : ℕ → Ω → S
  P : Measure Ω
  hP : IsProbabilityMeasure P
  hξ_meas : ∀ t, Measurable (ξ t)
  hξ_indep : iIndepFun (β := fun _ => S) ξ P
  hξ_ident : ∀ t, IdentDistrib (ξ t) (ξ 0) P P
  hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry gradL)

/-- Self-contained recursive process definition for subgradient method (Archetype B). -/
noncomputable def SubgradientSetup.process (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω) : ℕ → Ω → E
  | 0 => fun _ => setup.w₀
  | t + 1 => fun ω => 
      let w_t := process setup t ω
      w_t - setup.η t • setup.gradL w_t (setup.ξ t ω)

namespace SubgradientSetup

variable (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω)

@[simp]
theorem process_zero : process setup 0 = fun _ => setup.w₀ := by
  rfl

@[simp]
theorem process_succ (t : ℕ) : process setup (t + 1) = fun ω => process setup t ω - setup.η t • setup.gradL (process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) := by
  rfl

end SubgradientSetup

-- ============================================================================
-- Convergence theorem (PRIMITIVE FORM — NO abstract subdifferential symbols)
-- ============================================================================
/-- Convex convergence for stochastic subgradient method (primitive inequality form).
Archetype B: novel proof structure bypassing Layer 1 meta-theorems.
Uses primitive subgradient condition: ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ
Derives variance bound internally from uniform oracle bound (Pattern I).
Used in: main result for non-smooth convex stochastic optimization (this file) -/
theorem subgradient_convergence_convex
    (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {G η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    -- PRIMITIVE SUBGRADIENT CONDITION (replaces abstract subdifferential membership):
    (hsubgrad : ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪setup.gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ)
    (hbounded : ∀ w s, ‖setup.gradL w s‖ ≤ G)
    (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hη : ∀ t, setup.η t = η)
    (T : ℕ) (hT : 0 < T)
    (h_int_f : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => f (setup.process t ω)) setup.P)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.P)
    (h_int_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.P) :
    (1 / (T : ℝ)) * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T,
        (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
      ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 / (2 * η * T) + η * G ^ 2 / 2 := by
  have hG_nonneg : 0 ≤ G := by
    have := hbounded setup.w₀ (setup.ξ 0 (Classical.arbitrary Ω))
    exact norm_nonneg _
  
  have h_pointwise : ∀ t ω,
    2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ≤
    ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 +
    η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
    intro t ω
    let w_t := setup.process t ω
    let g_t := setup.gradL w_t (setup.ξ t ω)
    have h_step : setup.process (t + 1) ω = w_t - setup.η t • g_t := by
      rw [SubgradientSetup.process_succ]
    rw [h_step]
    have h_norm : ‖w_t - setup.η t • g_t - wStar‖ ^ 2 =
        ‖w_t - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * setup.η t * ⟪g_t, w_t - wStar⟫_ℝ +
        (setup.η t) ^ 2 * ‖g_t‖ ^ 2 := by
      calc
        ‖w_t - setup.η t • g_t - wStar‖ ^ 2 = ‖(w_t - wStar) - setup.η t • g_t‖ ^ 2 := by abel
        _ = ‖w_t - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * ⟪setup.η t • g_t, w_t - wStar⟫_ℝ + ‖setup.η t • g_t‖ ^ 2 := by
          rw [norm_sub_sq_real]
        _ = ‖w_t - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * setup.η t * ⟪g_t, w_t - wStar⟫_ℝ + (setup.η t) ^ 2 * ‖g_t‖ ^ 2 := by
          simp [inner_smul_left, norm_smul, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_of_nonneg (le_of_lt hη_pos)]
          <;> ring_nf
    have h_sub : f wStar ≥ f w_t + ⟪g_t, wStar - w_t⟫_ℝ := hsubgrad w_t (setup.ξ t ω) wStar
    have h_inner : ⟪g_t, w_t - wStar⟫_ℝ ≥ f w_t - f wStar := by
      have : ⟪g_t, wStar - w_t⟫_ℝ = -⟪g_t, w_t - wStar⟫_ℝ := by
        rw [inner_sub_left]
        simp [inner_comm]
        <;> ring_nf
      linarith
    calc
      2 * η * (f w_t - f wStar) ≤ 2 * η * ⟪g_t, w_t - wStar⟫_ℝ := by gcongr <;> linarith
      _ = 2 * setup.η t * ⟪g_t, w_t - wStar⟫_ℝ := by rw [hη t]
      _ = ‖w_t - wStar‖ ^ 2 + (setup.η t) ^ 2 * ‖g_t‖ ^ 2 - ‖w_t - setup.η t • g_t - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
        linarith [h_norm]
      _ = ‖w_t - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖w_t - setup.η t • g_t - wStar‖ ^ 2 + (setup.η t) ^ 2 * ‖g_t‖ ^ 2 := by ring
      _ = ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * ‖g_t‖ ^ 2 := by
        rw [h_step, hη t]
        <;> simp
        <;> ring
  
  have h_int_ineq : ∀ t,
    2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
    (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) -
    (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) +
    η ^ 2 * (∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
    intro t
    have h1 : Integrable (fun ω => f (setup.process t ω)) setup.P := h_int_f t
    have h2 : Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.P := h_int_norm_sq t
    have h3 : Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.P := h_int_norm_sq (t + 1)
    have h4 : Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.P := h_int_sq t
    have h5 : ∀ ω, 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ≤
        ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 +
        η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := h_pointwise t
    calc
      2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) =
          ∫ ω, 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ∂setup.P := by
        rw [mul_sub, ← integral_mul_left, ← integral_const setup.P (f wStar), integral_sub h1 (integrable_const _)]
        <;> simp
      _ ≤ ∫ ω, (‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 +
          η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P := by
        apply integral_mono_on setup.P (Set.univ : Set Ω)
        · exact h5
        · exact MeasurableSet.univ
        · intro ω hω; exact h5 ω
      _ = (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) -
          (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) +
          η ^ 2 * (∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
        rw [integral_add (Integrable.sub h2 h3) (Integrable.mul_const h4), integral_sub h2 h3, integral_mul_left]
        <;> ring
  
  have h_sum : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, 2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
      ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ((∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) -
        (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) +
        η ^ 2 * (∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) := by
    apply Finset.sum_le_sum
    intro t ht
    exact h_int_ineq t
  
  have h_telescope : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ((∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) -
      (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) =
      (∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) -
      (∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
    have h6 : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ((∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) -
        (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) =
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) -
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
      rw [Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
    rw [h6]
    have h7 : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) =
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (T + 1), (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
      rw [Finset.sum_range_succ']
      <;> simp [Finset.Ico_eq_empty_of_le]
      <;> rfl
    rw [h7]
    have h8 : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) -
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.Ico 1 (T + 1), (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) =
        (∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) -
        (∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
      have h9 : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) =
          ∑ t ∈ Finset.Ico 0 T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
        simp [Finset.range_eq_Ico]
      rw [h9]
      have h10 : ∑ t ∈ Finset.Ico 0 T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) +
          (∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) =
          ∑ t ∈ Finset.Ico 0 (T + 1), (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
