have hη_const : ∀ t, setup.η t = η := hη
    have hG_nonneg : 0 ≤ G := by
      have := hbounded setup.w₀ (setup.ξ 0 (Classical.arbitrary Ω))
      exact norm_nonneg _ ▸ this
    -- Key lemma: pointwise norm expansion with subgradient inequality
    have h_pointwise_bound : ∀ (t : ℕ) (ω : Ω),
        ‖setup.process setup (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ≤
        ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 -
        2 * η * (f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar) +
        η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
      intro t ω
      have h_step : setup.process setup (t + 1) ω =
          setup.process setup t ω - setup.η t • setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) := by
        rw [SubgradientSetup.process_succ]
        <;> simp
      rw [h_step]
      have h_wt := setup.process setup t ω
      have h_gt := setup.gradL h_wt (setup.ξ t ω)
      have h_eta := hη_const t
      rw [h_eta]
      -- Expand norm squared: ‖(w_t - w*) - η • g_t‖²
      have h_expand : ‖h_wt - wStar - η • h_gt‖ ^ 2 =
          ‖h_wt - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪h_gt, h_wt - wStar⟫ + η ^ 2 * ‖h_gt‖ ^ 2 := by
        calc
          ‖h_wt - wStar - η • h_gt‖ ^ 2 = ‖(h_wt - wStar) - η • h_gt‖ ^ 2 := by ring_nf
          _ = ‖h_wt - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * ⟪η • h_gt, h_wt - wStar⟫ + ‖η • h_gt‖ ^ 2 := by
            rw [norm_sub_sq_real]
            <;> simp [inner_comm]
          _ = ‖h_wt - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪h_gt, h_wt - wStar⟫ + η ^ 2 * ‖h_gt‖ ^ 2 := by
            simp [inner_smul_left, norm_smul, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg (le_of_lt hη_pos)]
            <;> ring_nf
            <;> field_simp
            <;> ring_nf
      rw [h_expand]
      -- Apply subgradient inequality: f(w*) ≥ f(w_t) + ⟪g_t, w* - w_t⟫
      have h_subgrad := hsubgrad h_wt (setup.ξ t ω) wStar
      have h_inner : ⟪h_gt, h_wt - wStar⟫ ≥ f h_wt - f wStar := by
        have : f wStar ≥ f h_wt + ⟪h_gt, wStar - h_wt⟫_ℝ := h_subgrad
        have : ⟪h_gt, wStar - h_wt⟫_ℝ = -⟪h_gt, h_wt - wStar⟫_ℝ := by
          rw [inner_sub_left, inner_comm]
          <;> abel

      have h_combine : -2 * η * ⟪h_gt, h_wt - wStar⟫ ≤ -2 * η * (f h_wt - f wStar) := by
        have : ⟪h_gt, h_wt - wStar⟫ ≥ f h_wt - f wStar := h_inner
        have : -2 * η ≤ 0 := by linarith
        nlinarith
      linarith
    -- Integrate the pointwise bound
    have h_integrated_bound : ∀ (t : ℕ),
        (∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) ≤
        (∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) -
        2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process setup t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) +
        η ^ 2 * (∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
      intro t
      have h_ptwise : ∀ ω, ‖setup.process setup (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ≤

      have h_int_le : (∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) ≤

          2 * η * (f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar) +

          _ = (∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) -

theorem subgradient_convergence_convex
    (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {G η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hsubgrad : ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪setup.gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ)
    (hbounded : ∀ w s, ‖setup.gradL w s‖ ≤ G)
    (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hη : ∀ t, setup.η t = η)
    (T : ℕ) (hT : 0 < T)
    (h_int_f : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => f (setup.process t ω)) setup.P)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.P)
    (h_int_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.P) :
    (1 / (T : ℝ)) * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T,
        (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
      ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 / (2 * η * T) + η * G ^ 2 / 2 := by
  have hη_const : ∀ t, setup.η t = η := hη
  have hG_nonneg : 0 ≤ G := by
    have := hbounded setup.w₀ (setup.ξ 0 (Classical.arbitrary Ω))
    exact norm_nonneg _ ▸ this
  -- Key lemma: pointwise norm expansion with subgradient inequality
  have h_pointwise_bound : ∀ (t : ℕ) (ω : Ω),
      ‖setup.process setup (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ≤
      ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 -
      2 * η * (f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar) +
      η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
    intro t ω
    have h_step : setup.process setup (t + 1) ω =
        setup.process setup t ω - setup.η t • setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) := by
      rw [SubgradientSetup.process_succ]
      <;> simp
    rw [h_step]
    have h_wt := setup.process setup t ω
    have h_gt := setup.gradL h_wt (setup.ξ t ω)
    have h_eta := hη_const t
    rw [h_eta]
    -- Expand norm squared: ‖(w_t - w*) - η • g_t‖²
    have h_expand : ‖h_wt - wStar - η • h_gt‖ ^ 2 =
        ‖h_wt - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪h_gt, h_wt - wStar⟫ + η ^ 2 * ‖h_gt‖ ^ 2 := by
      calc
        ‖h_wt - wStar - η • h_gt‖ ^ 2 = ‖(h_wt - wStar) - η • h_gt‖ ^ 2 := by ring_nf
        _ = ‖h_wt - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * ⟪η • h_gt, h_wt - wStar⟫ + ‖η • h_gt‖ ^ 2 := by
          rw [norm_sub_sq_real]
          <;> simp [inner_comm]
        _ = ‖h_wt - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪h_gt, h_wt - wStar⟫ + η ^ 2 * ‖h_gt‖ ^ 2 := by
          simp [inner_smul_left, norm_smul, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg (le_of_lt hη_pos)]
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> field_simp
          <;> ring_nf
    rw [h_expand]
    -- Apply subgradient inequality: f(w*) ≥ f(w_t) + ⟪g_t, w* - w_t⟫
    have h_subgrad := hsubgrad h_wt (setup.ξ t ω) wStar
    have h_inner : ⟪h_gt, h_wt - wStar⟫ ≥ f h_wt - f wStar := by
      have : f wStar ≥ f h_wt + ⟪h_gt, wStar - h_wt⟫_ℝ := h_subgrad
      have : ⟪h_gt, wStar - h_wt⟫_ℝ = -⟪h_gt, h_wt - wStar⟫_ℝ := by
        rw [inner_sub_left, inner_comm]
        <;> abel
      rw [this] at this
      linarith
    -- Combine: -2η⟪g_t, w_t - w*⟫ ≤ -2η(f(w_t) - f(w*))
    have h_combine : -2 * η * ⟪h_gt, h_wt - wStar⟫ ≤ -2 * η * (f h_wt - f wStar) := by
      have : ⟪h_gt, h_wt - wStar⟫ ≥ f h_wt - f wStar := h_inner
      have : -2 * η ≤ 0 := by linarith
      nlinarith
    linarith
  -- Integrate the pointwise bound
  have h_integrated_bound : ∀ (t : ℕ),
      (∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) ≤
      (∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) -
      2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process setup t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) +
      η ^ 2 * (∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
    intro t
    have h_ptwise : ∀ ω, ‖setup.process setup (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ≤
        ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 -
        2 * η * (f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar) +
        η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := h_pointwise_bound t

      apply MeasureTheory.integral_mono setup.hP

      · exact h_ptwise
    have h_split : ∫ ω, (‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 -
        2 * η * (f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar) +
        η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P =
        (∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) -

      have h1 : Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.P := h_int_norm_sq t
      have h2 : Integrable (fun ω => f (setup.process setup t ω)) setup.P := h_int_f t
      have h3 : Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.P := h_int_sq t
      have h4 : Integrable (fun ω => (2 : ℝ) * η * (f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar)) setup.P := by
        apply Integrable.const_mul
        apply Integrable.sub h2
        exact integrable_const _
      have h5 : Integrable (fun ω => η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.P := by
        apply Integrable.const_mul h3

            (∫ ω, η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by

            (∫ ω, (2 : ℝ) * η * (f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar) ∂setup.P) +
            (∫ ω, η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
          rw [MeasureTheory.integral_neg h4]
          <;> ring_nf
        _ = (∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) -
            2 * η * (∫ ω, (f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar) ∂setup.P) +
            η ^ 2 * (∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
          rw [MeasureTheory.integral_const_mul, MeasureTheory.integral_const_mul]
          <;> simp
          <;> ring_nf
        _ = (∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) -
            2 * η * ((∫ ω, f (setup.process setup t ω) ∂setup.P) - f wStar) +
            η ^ 2 * (∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
          have : (∫ ω, (f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar) ∂setup.P) =
              (∫ ω, f (setup.process setup t ω) ∂setup.P) - f wStar := by
            rw [MeasureTheory.integral_sub h2 (integrable_const _)]
            simp [setup.hP]
          rw [this]
          <;> ring_nf

    intro t
    have h_bound_ptwise : ∀ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ≤ G ^ 2 := by

      have : 0 ≤ ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ := norm_nonneg _

full_code:
import Main
import Lib.Glue.Algebra
import Lib.Glue.Probability
import Lib.Layer0.IndepExpect

/-!
# Stochastic Subgradient Method — Convex Non-Smooth Optimization (Primitive Form)

Layer: 2 (concrete algorithm proof with novel structure)

CRITICAL CORRECTION: Removed all abstract subdifferential symbols per Principle A.
Replaced with primitive inequality form: ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ
This avoids invented symbols and matches Mathlib's primitive requirements.

Archetype B — novel proof structure bypassing Layer 1 meta-theorems due to:
- Absence of gradF/unbiasedness hypotheses
- Direct use of primitive subgradient inequality in pointwise bound
- Variance bound derived internally from uniform oracle bound (Pattern I)

Proof chain (convex case, constant η):
1. Pointwise norm expansion via `norm_sq_sgd_step`
2. Primitive subgradient inequality: f(wₜ) - f(w*) ≤ ⟪gₜ, wₜ - w*⟫ (direct quantifier form)
3. Substitute inequality into expansion
4. Integrate + linearity
5. Bounded oracle → variance bound via Pattern I
6. Telescope sum + algebraic rearrangement

Design compliance:
- Convention §1: Variance bound derived internally with explicit integrability
- Convention §2: hgL stored in structure (weakest measurability level)
- Convention §4: All lemmas include Used in: tags
- Convention §5: NOT APPLICABLE (uniform oracle bound)

Used in: main convergence result for non-smooth convex stochastic optimization
-/

open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
open scoped InnerProductSpace

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

-- ============================================================================
-- SubgradientSetup: NO gradF field (non-smooth objective)
-- ============================================================================
/-- Complete setup for stochastic subgradient method.
Critical distinction: contains NO `gradF` field (non-smooth objective has no gradient).
Includes oracle measurability `hgL` as structure field (Convention §2). -/
structure SubgradientSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  w₀ : E
  η : ℕ → ℝ
  gradL : E → S → E
  ξ : ℕ → Ω → S
  P : Measure Ω
  hP : IsProbabilityMeasure P
  hξ_meas : ∀ t, Measurable (ξ t)
  hξ_indep : iIndepFun (β := fun _ => S) ξ P
  hξ_ident : ∀ t, IdentDistrib (ξ t) (ξ 0) P P
  hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry gradL)

/-- Self-contained recursive process definition for subgradient method (Archetype B). -/
noncomputable def SubgradientSetup.process (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω) : ℕ → Ω → E
  | 0 => fun _ => setup.w₀
  | t + 1 => fun ω => 
      let w_t := process setup t ω
      w_t - setup.η t • setup.gradL w_t (setup.ξ t ω)

namespace SubgradientSetup

variable (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω)

@[simp]
theorem process_zero : process setup 0 = fun _ => setup.w₀ := by
  sorry
@[simp]
theorem process_succ (t : ℕ) : process setup (t + 1) = fun ω => process setup t ω - setup.η t • setup.gradL (process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) := by
  sorry

end SubgradientSetup

-- ============================================================================
-- Convergence theorem (PRIMITIVE FORM — NO abstract subdifferential symbols)
-- ============================================================================
/-- Convex convergence for stochastic subgradient method (primitive inequality form).
Archetype B: novel proof structure bypassing Layer 1 meta-theorems.
Uses primitive subgradient condition: ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ
Derives variance bound internally from uniform oracle bound (Pattern I).
Used in: main result for non-smooth convex stochastic optimization (this file) -/
theorem subgradient_convergence_convex
    (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {G η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    -- PRIMITIVE SUBGRADIENT CONDITION (replaces abstract subdifferential membership):
    (hsubgrad : ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪setup.gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ)
    (hbounded : ∀ w s, ‖setup.gradL w s‖ ≤ G)
    (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hη : ∀ t, setup.η t = η)
    (T : ℕ) (hT : 0 < T)
    (h_int_f : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => f (setup.process t ω)) setup.P)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.P)
    (h_int_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.P) :
    (1 / (T : ℝ)) * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T,
        (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
      ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 / (2 * η * T) + η * G ^ 2 / 2 := by
  have hη_const : ∀ t, setup.η t = η := hη
    have hG_nonneg : 0 ≤ G := by
      have := hbounded setup.w₀ (setup.ξ 0 (Classical.arbitrary Ω))
      exact norm_nonneg _ ▸ this
    -- Key lemma: pointwise norm expansion with subgradient inequality
    have h_pointwise_bound : ∀ (t : ℕ) (ω : Ω),
        ‖setup.process setup (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ≤
        ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 -
        2 * η * (f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar) +
        η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
      intro t ω
      have h_step : setup.process setup (t + 1) ω =

        rw [SubgradientSetup.process_succ]

      rw [h_step]
      have h_wt := setup.process setup t ω
      have h_gt := setup.gradL h_wt (setup.ξ t ω)
      have h_eta := hη_const t
      rw [h_eta]
      -- Expand norm squared: ‖(w_t - w*) - η • g_t‖²
      have h_expand : ‖h_wt - wStar - η • h_gt‖ ^ 2 =
          ‖h_wt - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪h_gt, h_wt - wStar⟫ + η ^ 2 * ‖h_gt‖ ^ 2 := by
        calc

          _ = ‖h_wt - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * ⟪η • h_gt, h_wt - wStar⟫ + ‖η • h_gt‖ ^ 2 := by
            rw [norm_sub_sq_real]
            <;> simp [inner_comm]
          _ = ‖h_wt - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪h_gt, h_wt - wStar⟫ + η ^ 2 * ‖h_gt‖ ^ 2 := by
            simp [inner_smul_left, norm_smul, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg (le_of_lt hη_pos)]
            <;> ring_nf
            <;> field_simp
            <;> ring_nf
      rw [h_expand]
      -- Apply subgradient inequality: f(w*) ≥ f(w_t) + ⟪g_t, w* - w_t⟫
      have h_subgrad := hsubgrad h_wt (setup.ξ t ω) wStar

        have : ⟪h_gt, wStar - h_wt⟫_ℝ = -⟪h_gt, h_wt - wStar⟫_ℝ := by

        have : ⟪h_gt, h_wt - wStar⟫ ≥ f h_wt - f wStar := h_inner

        η ^ 2 * (∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
      intro t

          2 * η * (f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar) +

      have h_int_le : (∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) ≤
          ∫ ω, (‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 -
          2 * η * (f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar) +
          η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P := by
        apply MeasureTheory.integral_mono setup.hP
        · exact h_int_norm_sq (t + 1)
        · exact h_ptwise
      have h_split : ∫ ω, (‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 -
          2 * η * (f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar) +
          η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P =
          (∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) -
          2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process setup t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) +
          η ^ 2 * (∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
        have h1 : Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.P := h_int_norm_sq t
        have h2 : Integrable (fun ω => f (setup.process setup t ω)) setup.P := h_int_f t
        have h3 : Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.P := h_int_sq t
        have h4 : Integrable (fun ω => (2 : ℝ) * η * (f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar)) setup.P := by
          apply Integrable.const_mul
          apply Integrable.sub h2
          exact integrable_const _
        have h5 : Integrable (fun ω => η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.P := by
          apply Integrable.const_mul h3
        calc
          ∫ ω, (‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 -
              2 * η * (f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar) +

              ∫ ω, (‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 +
              (-(2 : ℝ) * η * (f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar)) +

            congr

              (∫ ω, η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by

            <;> simp
          _ = (∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) -

              η ^ 2 * (∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
            rw [MeasureTheory.integral_const_mul, MeasureTheory.integral_const_mul]
            <;> simp
            <;> ring_nf
          _ = (∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) -
              2 * η * ((∫ ω, f (setup.process setup t ω) ∂setup.P) - f wStar) +
              η ^ 2 * (∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
            have : (∫ ω, (f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar) ∂setup.P) =
                (∫ ω, f (setup.process setup t ω) ∂setup.P) - f wStar := by
              rw [MeasureTheory.integral_sub h2 (integrable_const _)]

            rw [this]
            <;> ring_nf
      rw [h_int_le, h_split]
    -- Apply bounded gradient: ‖g_t‖² ≤ G²
    have h_bounded_integral : ∀ (t : ℕ),
        (∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) ≤ G ^ 2 := by
      intro t
      have h_bound_ptwise : ∀ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ≤ G ^ 2 := by
        intro ω
        have := hbounded (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)
        have : 0 ≤ G := hG_nonneg
        have : 0 ≤ ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ := norm_nonneg _
        nlinarith
      have : (∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) ≤
          ∫ ω, (G ^ 2 : ℝ) ∂setup.P := by
        apply MeasureTheory.integral_mono setup.hP
        · exact h_int_sq t
        · exact h_bound_ptwise
      have : ∫ ω, (G ^ 2 : ℝ) ∂setup.P = G ^ 2 := by
        simp [setup.hP]
      linarith
    -- Combine to get recurrence on expected distances
    have h_recurrence : ∀ (t : ℕ),
        2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process setup t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
        (∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) -
        (∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) +
        η ^ 2 * G ^ 2 := by
      intro t

      have h_bounded := h_bounded_integral t

    -- Sum over t ∈ range T
    have h_sum_bound : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process setup t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar)) ≤
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ((∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) -

            ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (η ^ 2 * G ^ 2 : ℝ) := by
          rw [Finset.sum_add_distrib]

proof_code:
rfl

  @[simp]
  theorem process_succ (t : ℕ) : process setup (t + 1) = fun ω => process setup t ω - setup.η t • setup.gradL (process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) := by
    rfl

  end SubgradientSetup

  theorem subgradient_convergence_convex
      (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {G η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
      (hsubgrad : ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪setup.gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ)
      (hbounded : ∀ w s, ‖setup.gradL w s‖ ≤ G)
      (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hη : ∀ t, setup.η t = η)
      (T : ℕ) (hT : 0 < T)
      (h_int_f : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => f (setup.process t ω)) setup.P)
      (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.P)
      (h_int_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
          ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.P) :
      (1 / (T : ℝ)) * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T,
          (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
        ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 / (2 * η * T) + η * G ^ 2 / 2 := by
    have hη_const : ∀ t, setup.η t = η := hη
    -- Key lemma: pointwise bound for each iteration
    have h_iter_bound : ∀ (t : ℕ) (ω : Ω),
        2 * η * (f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar) ≤
          ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process setup (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 +
          η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
      intro t ω
      have h_step : setup.process setup (t + 1) ω = setup.process setup t ω - setup.η t • setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) := by
        rw [SubgradientSetup.process_succ]
      rw [h_step]
      have hη_t : setup.η t = η := hη_const t
      rw [hη_t]
      -- Expand the squared norm
      have h_expand : ‖setup.process setup t ω - η • setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) - wStar‖ ^ 2 =
          ‖(setup.process setup t ω - wStar) - η • setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
        congr 1
        abel
      rw [h_expand]
      -- Use norm expansion: ‖a - b‖² = ‖a‖² - 2⟨a,b⟩ + ‖b‖²
      have h_norm_exp : ‖(setup.process setup t ω - wStar) - η • setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 =
          ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process setup t ω - wStar⟫ +
          η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
        calc
          ‖(setup.process setup t ω - wStar) - η • setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2
            = ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * ⟪setup.process setup t ω - wStar, η • setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)⟫ +
              ‖η • setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
            rw [norm_sub_sq_real]
          _ = ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪setup.process setup t ω - wStar, setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)⟫ +
              η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
            simp [inner_smul_right, norm_smul, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_of_nonneg (le_of_lt hη_pos)]
            <;> ring_nf
            <;> simp [inner_comm]
          _ = ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process setup t ω - wStar⟫ +
              η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
            rw [inner_comm]
      rw [h_norm_exp]
      -- Apply subgradient inequality: f(w*) ≥ f(w_t) + ⟨g_t, w* - w_t⟩
      have h_sub : f wStar ≥ f (setup.process setup t ω) + ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), wStar - setup.process setup t ω⟫ :=
        hsubgrad (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) wStar
      have h_sub2 : ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), wStar - setup.process setup t ω⟫ ≥ f wStar - f (setup.process setup t ω) := by
        linarith
      have h_sub3 : ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process setup t ω - wStar⟫ ≥ f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar := by
        have : ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process setup t ω - wStar⟫ =
            -⟪setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), wStar - setup.process setup t ω⟫ := by
          rw [inner_sub, inner_comm]
          simp [inner_sub]
          <;> ring
        rw [this]
        linarith
      -- Combine to get the bound
      have h_main : 2 * η * (f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar) ≤
          2 * η * ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process setup t ω - wStar⟫ := by
        nlinarith [hη_pos]
      linarith
    -- Integrate the bound for each t
    have h_int_bound : ∀ t < T,
        2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process setup t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
          (∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) -
          (∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) +
          η ^ 2 * (∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
      intro t ht
      have h_pointwise : ∀ ω, 2 * η * (f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar) ≤
          ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process setup (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 +
          η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := h_iter_bound t
      have h_integrable_f : Integrable (fun ω => f (setup.process setup t ω)) setup.P := h_int_f t
      have h_integrable_norm_t : Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.P := h_int_norm_sq t
      have h_integrable_norm_tp1 : Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.process setup (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.P := h_int_norm_sq (t + 1)
      have h_integrable_grad : Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.P := h_int_sq t
      -- Integrate the pointwise inequality
      have h_int_ineq : ∫ ω, 2 * η * (f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar) ∂setup.P ≤
          ∫ ω, (‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process setup (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 +
            η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P := by
        apply integral_mono_on_univ
        · exact h_integrable_f.sub_const _
        · exact h_integrable_norm_t.sub h_integrable_norm_tp1 |>.add (h_integrable_grad.const_smul _)
        · intro ω
          exact h_pointwise ω
      -- Simplify the integrals
      have h_left : ∫ ω, 2 * η * (f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar) ∂setup.P =
          2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process setup t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) := by
        calc
          ∫ ω, 2 * η * (f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar) ∂setup.P
            = 2 * η * ∫ ω, (f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar) ∂setup.P := by
              simp [integral_const_smul]
          _ = 2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process setup t ω) ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, f wStar ∂setup.P) := by
            rw [integral_sub h_integrable_f (integrable_const _)]
          _ = 2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process setup t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) := by
            simp [integral_const, setup.hP]
      have h_right : ∫ ω, (‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process setup (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 +
            η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P =
          (∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) -
          (∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) +
          η ^ 2 * (∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
        calc
          ∫ ω, (‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process setup (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 +
            η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P
            = ∫ ω, (‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process setup (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P +
              ∫ ω, η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
            rw [integral_add (h_integrable_norm_t.sub h_integrable_norm_tp1) (h_integrable_grad.const_smul _)]
          _ = (∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) +
              η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
            rw [integral_sub h_integrable_norm_t h_integrable_norm_tp1, integral_const_smul]
          _ = (∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) -
              (∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) +
              η ^ 2 * (∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
            ring
      rw [h_left, h_right] at h_int_ineq
      exact h_int_ineq
    -- Sum over t and telescope
    have h_sum_bound : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process setup t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar)) ≤
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ((∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) -
          (∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) +
          η ^ 2 * (∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) := by
      apply Finset.sum_le_sum
      intro t ht
      exact h_int_bound t (Finset.mem_range.mp ht)
    -- Telescope the norm terms
    have h_telescope : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ((∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) -
        (∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) =
        (∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) -
        (∫ ω, ‖setup.process setup T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by

full_code:
import Main
import Lib.Glue.Algebra
import Lib.Glue.Probability
import Lib.Layer0.IndepExpect

/-!
# Stochastic Subgradient Method — Convex Non-Smooth Optimization (Primitive Form)

Layer: 2 (concrete algorithm proof with novel structure)

CRITICAL CORRECTION: Removed all abstract subdifferential symbols per Principle A.
Replaced with primitive inequality form: ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ
This avoids invented symbols and matches Mathlib's primitive requirements.

Archetype B — novel proof structure bypassing Layer 1 meta-theorems due to:
- Absence of gradF/unbiasedness hypotheses
- Direct use of primitive subgradient inequality in pointwise bound
- Variance bound derived internally from uniform oracle bound (Pattern I)

Proof chain (convex case, constant η):
1. Pointwise norm expansion via `norm_sq_sgd_step`
2. Primitive subgradient inequality: f(wₜ) - f(w*) ≤ ⟪gₜ, wₜ - w*⟫ (direct quantifier form)
3. Substitute inequality into expansion
4. Integrate + linearity
5. Bounded oracle → variance bound via Pattern I
6. Telescope sum + algebraic rearrangement

Design compliance:
- Convention §1: Variance bound derived internally with explicit integrability
- Convention §2: hgL stored in structure (weakest measurability level)
- Convention §4: All lemmas include Used in: tags
- Convention §5: NOT APPLICABLE (uniform oracle bound)

Used in: main convergence result for non-smooth convex stochastic optimization
-/

open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
open scoped InnerProductSpace

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

-- ============================================================================
-- SubgradientSetup: NO gradF field (non-smooth objective)
-- ============================================================================
/-- Complete setup for stochastic subgradient method.
Critical distinction: contains NO `gradF` field (non-smooth objective has no gradient).
Includes oracle measurability `hgL` as structure field (Convention §2). -/
structure SubgradientSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  w₀ : E
  η : ℕ → ℝ
  gradL : E → S → E
  ξ : ℕ → Ω → S
  P : Measure Ω
  hP : IsProbabilityMeasure P
  hξ_meas : ∀ t, Measurable (ξ t)
  hξ_indep : iIndepFun (β := fun _ => S) ξ P
  hξ_ident : ∀ t, IdentDistrib (ξ t) (ξ 0) P P
  hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry gradL)

/-- Self-contained recursive process definition for subgradient method (Archetype B). -/
noncomputable def SubgradientSetup.process (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω) : ℕ → Ω → E
  | 0 => fun _ => setup.w₀
  | t + 1 => fun ω => 
      let w_t := process setup t ω
      w_t - setup.η t • setup.gradL w_t (setup.ξ t ω)

namespace SubgradientSetup

variable (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω)

@[simp]
theorem process_zero : process setup 0 = fun _ => setup.w₀ := by
  sorry
@[simp]
theorem process_succ (t : ℕ) : process setup (t + 1) = fun ω => process setup t ω - setup.η t • setup.gradL (process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) := by
  sorry

end SubgradientSetup

-- ============================================================================
-- Convergence theorem (PRIMITIVE FORM — NO abstract subdifferential symbols)
-- ============================================================================
/-- Convex convergence for stochastic subgradient method (primitive inequality form).
Archetype B: novel proof structure bypassing Layer 1 meta-theorems.
Uses primitive subgradient condition: ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ
Derives variance bound internally from uniform oracle bound (Pattern I).
Used in: main result for non-smooth convex stochastic optimization (this file) -/
theorem subgradient_convergence_convex
    (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {G η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    -- PRIMITIVE SUBGRADIENT CONDITION (replaces abstract subdifferential membership):
    (hsubgrad : ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪setup.gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ)
    (hbounded : ∀ w s, ‖setup.gradL w s‖ ≤ G)
    (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hη : ∀ t, setup.η t = η)
    (T : ℕ) (hT : 0 < T)
    (h_int_f : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => f (setup.process t ω)) setup.P)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.P)
    (h_int_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.P) :
    (1 / (T : ℝ)) * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T,
        (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
      ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 / (2 * η * T) + η * G ^ 2 / 2 := by
  rfl

  @[simp]
  theorem process_succ (t : ℕ) : process setup (t + 1) = fun ω => process setup t ω - setup.η t • setup.gradL (process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) := by
    rfl

  end SubgradientSetup

  theorem subgradient_convergence_convex
      (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {G η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
      (hsubgrad : ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪setup.gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ)
      (hbounded : ∀ w s, ‖setup.gradL w s‖ ≤ G)
      (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hη : ∀ t, setup.η t = η)
      (T : ℕ) (hT : 0 < T)
      (h_int_f : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => f (setup.process t ω)) setup.P)
      (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.P)
      (h_int_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
          ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.P) :
      (1 / (T : ℝ)) * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T,
          (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
        ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 / (2 * η * T) + η * G ^ 2 / 2 := by
    have hη_const : ∀ t, setup.η t = η := hη
    -- Key lemma: pointwise bound for each iteration
    have h_iter_bound : ∀ (t : ℕ) (ω : Ω),
        2 * η * (f (setup.process setup t ω) - f wStar) ≤
          ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process setup (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 +
          η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
      intro t ω
      have h_step : setup.process setup (t + 1) ω = setup.process setup t ω - setup.η t • setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) := by
        rw [SubgradientSetup.process_succ]
      rw [h_step]
      have hη_t : setup.η t = η := hη_const t
      rw [hη_t]
      -- Expand the squared norm
      have h_expand : ‖setup.process setup t ω - η • setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) - wStar‖ ^ 2 =
          ‖(setup.process setup t ω - wStar) - η • setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
        congr 1
        abel
      rw [h_expand]
      -- Use norm expansion: ‖a - b‖² = ‖a‖² - 2⟨a,b⟩ + ‖b‖²
      have h_norm_exp : ‖(setup.process setup t ω - wStar) - η • setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 =
          ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω), setup.process setup t ω - wStar⟫ +
          η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
        calc
          ‖(setup.process setup t ω - wStar) - η • setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2
            = ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * ⟪setup.process setup t ω - wStar, η • setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)⟫ +
              ‖η • setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
            rw [norm_sub_sq_real]
          _ = ‖setup.process setup t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪setup.process setup t ω - wStar, setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)⟫ +
              η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
            simp [inner_smul_right, norm_smul, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_of_nonneg (le_of_lt hη_pos)]

theorem subgradient_convergence_convex
    (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {G η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hsubgrad : ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪setup.gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ)
    (hbounded : ∀ w s, ‖setup.gradL w s‖ ≤ G)
    (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hη : ∀ t, setup.η t = η)
    (T : ℕ) (hT : 0 < T)
    (h_int_f : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => f (setup.process t ω)) setup.P)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.P)
    (h_int_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.P) :
    (1 / (T : ℝ)) * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T,
        (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
      ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 / (2 * η * T) + η * G ^ 2 / 2 := by
  have hη_const : ∀ t, setup.η t = η := hη
  have key_ineq : ∀ t ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ≤
      ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
    intro t ω
    let w_t := setup.process t ω
    let g_t := setup.gradL w_t (setup.ξ t ω)
    have h_step : setup.process (t + 1) ω = w_t - η • g_t := by
      rw [SubgradientSetup.process_succ]
      simp [hη t]
    rw [h_step]
    have h_norm_exp : ‖w_t - η • g_t - wStar‖ ^ 2 = ‖(w_t - wStar) - η • g_t‖ ^ 2 := by
      rw [sub_sub]
    rw [h_norm_exp]
    have h_inner_exp : ‖(w_t - wStar) - η • g_t‖ ^ 2 =
        ‖w_t - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪g_t, w_t - wStar⟫_ℝ + η ^ 2 * ‖g_t‖ ^ 2 := by
      rw [norm_sub_sq_real]
      simp [inner_smul_right, inner_comm, smul_eq_mul]
      ring
    rw [h_inner_exp]
    have h_subgrad : f wStar ≥ f w_t + ⟪g_t, wStar - w_t⟫_ℝ := hsubgrad w_t (setup.ξ t ω) wStar
    have h_subgrad' : ⟪g_t, w_t - wStar⟫_ℝ ≥ f w_t - f wStar := by
      have : ⟪g_t, wStar - w_t⟫_ℝ = -⟪g_t, w_t - wStar⟫_ℝ := by
        rw [inner_sub_right]
        simp [inner_neg_right]
      linarith
    linarith
  have h_sum_ineq : ∀ t, ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≥
      2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) - η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
    intro t
    have h_pointwise : ∀ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ≤
        ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
      intro ω
      exact key_ineq t ω
    have h_int_ineq : ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤
        ∫ ω, (‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P := by
      apply integral_mono_on
      · exact MeasurableSpace.toMeasurableSpace setup.P
      · exact Set.univ
      · intro ω _
        exact h_pointwise ω
      · exact MeasurableSet.univ
    have h_int_split : ∫ ω, (‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P =
        ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
      rw [integral_add, integral_sub, integral_sub]
      · rw [integral_const_mul, integral_const_mul]
        simp
      · exact h_int_norm_sq t
      · exact h_int_f t
      · exact h_int_sq t
    have h_diff : ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P =
        ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
      rw [integral_sub]
      · rfl
      · exact h_int_norm_sq t
      · exact h_int_norm_sq (t + 1)
    rw [h_diff]
    linarith
  have h_bound_sum : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
      (1 / (2 * η)) * (∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) +
      (η / 2) * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
    have h_sum_ineq' : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) ≥
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) - η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
      apply Finset.sum_le_sum
      intro t _
      exact h_sum_ineq t
    have h_telescope : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) =
        ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
      have h_telescope' : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) =
          ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
        apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
        intro t _
        rw [integral_sub]
        · rfl
        · exact h_int_norm_sq t
        · exact h_int_norm_sq (t + 1)
      rw [h_telescope']
      have h_sum_diff : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) =
          ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
        rw [Finset.sum_range_sub]
      rw [h_sum_diff]
    rw [h_telescope] at h_sum_ineq'
    have h_rearrange : ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≥
        2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) - η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
      rw [Finset.sum_sub_distrib, Finset.mul_sum] at h_sum_ineq'
      linarith
    have h_final : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
        (1 / (2 * η)) * (∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) +
        (η / 2) * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
      have h_pos : 0 < 2 * η := by linarith
      have h_div : (1 / (2 * η)) * (2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar)) =
          ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) := by
        field_simp [h_pos.ne']
        ring
      linarith
    exact h_final
  have h_grad_bound : ∀ t, ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤ G ^ 2 := by
    intro t
    have h_pointwise : ∀ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ≤ G ^ 2 := by
      intro ω
      have h_bound : ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ≤ G := hbounded (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)
      have h_sq : ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ≤ G ^ 2 := by
        gcongr
      exact h_sq
    have h_int_bound : ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤ ∫ ω, G ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
      apply integral_mono_on
      · exact MeasurableSpace.toMeasurableSpace setup.P
      · exact Set.univ
      · intro ω _
        exact h_pointwise ω
      · exact MeasurableSet.univ
    have h_const_int : ∫ ω, G ^ 2 ∂setup.P = G ^ 2 := by
      rw [integral_const]
      simp [setup.hP]
    linarith
  have h_sum_grad_bound : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤ T * G ^ 2 := by
    have h_each : ∀ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤ G ^ 2 := by
      intro t _
      exact h_grad_bound t
    have h_sum : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤ ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, G ^ 2 := by
      apply Finset.sum_le_sum
      exact h_each
    have h_const_sum : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, G ^ 2 = T * G ^ 2 := by
      simp [Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]
    linarith
  have h_w0_const : ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P = ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
    have h_process0 : setup.process 0 = fun _ => setup.w₀ := SubgradientSetup.process_zero setup
    have h_const : ∀ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 = ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
      intro ω
      rw [h_process0]
      simp
    have h_int_const : ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P = ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
      rw [integral_const]
      simp [setup.hP]
      congr
      ext ω
      exact h_const ω
    exact h_int_const
  have h_nonneg : 0 ≤ ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
    apply integral_nonneg
    intro ω
    exact sq_nonneg _
  have h_main : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
      (1 / (2 * η)) * ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 + (η / 2) * T * G ^ 2 := by
    have h_bound : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
        (1 / (2 * η)) * (∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) +
        (η / 2) * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := h_bound_sum
    have h_subst : (1 / (2 * η)) * (∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) +
        (η / 2) * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤
        (1 / (2 * η)) * ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 + (η / 2) * T * G ^ 2 := by
      have h1 : (1 / (2 * η)) * (∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) ≤
          (1 / (2 * η)) * ‖

import Main
import Lib.Glue.Algebra
import Lib.Glue.Probability
import Lib.Layer0.IndepExpect

/-!
# Stochastic Subgradient Method — Convex Non-Smooth Optimization (Primitive Form)

Layer: 2 (concrete algorithm proof with novel structure)

CRITICAL CORRECTION: Removed all abstract subdifferential symbols per Principle A.
Replaced with primitive inequality form: ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ
This avoids invented symbols and matches Mathlib's primitive requirements.

Archetype B — novel proof structure bypassing Layer 1 meta-theorems due to:
- Absence of gradF/unbiasedness hypotheses
- Direct use of primitive subgradient inequality in pointwise bound
- Variance bound derived internally from uniform oracle bound (Pattern I)

Proof chain (convex case, constant η):
1. Pointwise norm expansion via `norm_sq_sgd_step`
2. Primitive subgradient inequality: f(wₜ) - f(w*) ≤ ⟪gₜ, wₜ - w*⟫ (direct quantifier form)
3. Substitute inequality into expansion
4. Integrate + linearity
5. Bounded oracle → variance bound via Pattern I
6. Telescope sum + algebraic rearrangement

Design compliance:
- Convention §1: Variance bound derived internally with explicit integrability
- Convention §2: hgL stored in structure (weakest measurability level)
- Convention §4: All lemmas include Used in: tags
- Convention §5: NOT APPLICABLE (uniform oracle bound)

Used in: main convergence result for non-smooth convex stochastic optimization
-/

open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
open scoped InnerProductSpace

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

-- ============================================================================
-- SubgradientSetup: NO gradF field (non-smooth objective)
-- ============================================================================
/-- Complete setup for stochastic subgradient method.
Critical distinction: contains NO `gradF` field (non-smooth objective has no gradient).
Includes oracle measurability `hgL` as structure field (Convention §2). -/
structure SubgradientSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  w₀ : E
  η : ℕ → ℝ
  gradL : E → S → E
  ξ : ℕ → Ω → S
  P : Measure Ω
  hP : IsProbabilityMeasure P
  hξ_meas : ∀ t, Measurable (ξ t)
  hξ_indep : iIndepFun (β := fun _ => S) ξ P
  hξ_ident : ∀ t, IdentDistrib (ξ t) (ξ 0) P P
  hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry gradL)

/-- Self-contained recursive process definition for subgradient method (Archetype B). -/
noncomputable def SubgradientSetup.process (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω) : ℕ → Ω → E
  | 0 => fun _ => setup.w₀
  | t + 1 => fun ω => 
      let w_t := process setup t ω
      w_t - setup.η t • setup.gradL w_t (setup.ξ t ω)

namespace SubgradientSetup

variable (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω)

@[simp]
theorem process_zero : process setup 0 = fun _ => setup.w₀ := by
  sorry
@[simp]
theorem process_succ (t : ℕ) : process setup (t + 1) = fun ω => process setup t ω - setup.η t • setup.gradL (process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) := by
  sorry

end SubgradientSetup

-- ============================================================================
-- Convergence theorem (PRIMITIVE FORM — NO abstract subdifferential symbols)
-- ============================================================================
/-- Convex convergence for stochastic subgradient method (primitive inequality form).
Archetype B: novel proof structure bypassing Layer 1 meta-theorems.
Uses primitive subgradient condition: ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ
Derives variance bound internally from uniform oracle bound (Pattern I).
Used in: main result for non-smooth convex stochastic optimization (this file) -/
theorem subgradient_convergence_convex
    (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {G η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    -- PRIMITIVE SUBGRADIENT CONDITION (replaces abstract subdifferential membership):
    (hsubgrad : ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪setup.gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ)
    (hbounded : ∀ w s, ‖setup.gradL w s‖ ≤ G)
    (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hη : ∀ t, setup.η t = η)
    (T : ℕ) (hT : 0 < T)
    (h_int_f : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => f (setup.process t ω)) setup.P)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.P)
    (h_int_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.P) :
    (1 / (T : ℝ)) * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T,
        (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
      ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 / (2 * η * T) + η * G ^ 2 / 2 := by
  have hη_const : ∀ t, setup.η t = η := hη
    have key_ineq : ∀ t ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ≤
        ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
      intro t ω
      let w_t := setup.process t ω
      let g_t := setup.gradL w_t (setup.ξ t ω)
      have h_step : setup.process (t + 1) ω = w_t - η • g_t := by
        rw [SubgradientSetup.process_succ]
        simp [hη t]
      rw [h_step]
      have h_norm_exp : ‖w_t - η • g_t - wStar‖ ^ 2 = ‖(w_t - wStar) - η • g_t‖ ^ 2 := by
        rw [sub_sub]
      rw [h_norm_exp]
      have h_inner_exp : ‖(w_t - wStar) - η • g_t‖ ^ 2 =
          ‖w_t - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪g_t, w_t - wStar⟫_ℝ + η ^ 2 * ‖g_t‖ ^ 2 := by
        rw [norm_sub_sq_real]
        simp [inner_smul_right, inner_comm, smul_eq_mul]
        ring
      rw [h_inner_exp]
      have h_subgrad : f wStar ≥ f w_t + ⟪g_t, wStar - w_t⟫_ℝ := hsubgrad w_t (setup.ξ t ω) wStar
      have h_subgrad' : ⟪g_t, w_t - wStar⟫_ℝ ≥ f w_t - f wStar := by
        have : ⟪g_t, wStar - w_t⟫_ℝ = -⟪g_t, w_t - wStar⟫_ℝ := by
          rw [inner_sub_right]
          simp [inner_neg_right]
        linarith
      linarith
    have h_sum_ineq : ∀ t, ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≥
        2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) - η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
      intro t
      have h_pointwise : ∀ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ≤
          ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 := by
        intro ω
        exact key_ineq t ω
      have h_int_ineq : ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤
          ∫ ω, (‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P := by
        apply integral_mono_on
        · exact MeasurableSpace.toMeasurableSpace setup.P
        · exact Set.univ
        · intro ω _
          exact h_pointwise ω
        · exact MeasurableSet.univ
      have h_int_split : ∫ ω, (‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) ∂setup.P =
          ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - 2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
        rw [integral_add, integral_sub, integral_sub]
        · rw [integral_const_mul, integral_const_mul]
          simp
        · exact h_int_norm_sq t
        · exact h_int_f t
        · exact h_int_sq t
      have h_diff : ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P =
          ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
        rw [integral_sub]
        · rfl
        · exact h_int_norm_sq t
        · exact h_int_norm_sq (t + 1)
      rw [h_diff]
      linarith
    have h_bound_sum : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
        (1 / (2 * η)) * (∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) +
        (η / 2) * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
      have h_sum_ineq' : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) ≥
          ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) - η ^ 2 * ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
        apply Finset.sum_le_sum
        intro t _
        exact h_sum_ineq t
      have h_telescope : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) =
          ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
        have h_telescope' : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) =
            ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) := by
          apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
          intro t _
          rw [integral_sub]
          · rfl
          · exact h_int_norm_sq t
          · exact h_int_norm_sq (t + 1)
        rw [h_telescope']
        have h_sum_diff : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) =
            ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
          rw [Finset.sum_range_sub]
        rw [h_sum_diff]
      rw [h_telescope] at h_sum_ineq'
      have h_rearrange : ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≥
          2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) - η ^ 2 * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
        rw [Finset.sum_sub_distrib, Finset.mul_sum] at h_sum_ineq'
        linarith
      have h_final : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
          (1 / (2 * η)) * (∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) +

      apply integral_mono_on_AE setup.P
      · intro ω

      · apply Measurable.sub
        · exact h_int_f t
        · exact measurable_const
      · apply Measurable.add
        · apply Measurable.div

    have h₃ : ∫ ω, ((‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) / (2 * η) + η * G ^ 2 / 2) ∂setup.P =
        (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) / (2 * η) + η * G ^ 2 / 2 := by
      rw [integral_add (h_int_norm_sq t) (h_int_norm_sq (t + 1))]

      rw [div_eq_mul_inv]

import Main
import Lib.Glue.Algebra
import Lib.Glue.Probability
import Lib.Layer0.IndepExpect

/-!
# Stochastic Subgradient Method — Convex Non-Smooth Optimization (Primitive Form)

Layer: 2 (concrete algorithm proof with novel structure)

CRITICAL CORRECTION: Removed all abstract subdifferential symbols per Principle A.
Replaced with primitive inequality form: ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ
This avoids invented symbols and matches Mathlib's primitive requirements.

Archetype B — novel proof structure bypassing Layer 1 meta-theorems due to:
- Absence of gradF/unbiasedness hypotheses
- Direct use of primitive subgradient inequality in pointwise bound
- Variance bound derived internally from uniform oracle bound (Pattern I)

Proof chain (convex case, constant η):
1. Pointwise norm expansion via `norm_sq_sgd_step`
2. Primitive subgradient inequality: f(wₜ) - f(w*) ≤ ⟪gₜ, wₜ - w*⟫ (direct quantifier form)
3. Substitute inequality into expansion
4. Integrate + linearity
5. Bounded oracle → variance bound via Pattern I
6. Telescope sum + algebraic rearrangement

Design compliance:
- Convention §1: Variance bound derived internally with explicit integrability
- Convention §2: hgL stored in structure (weakest measurability level)
- Convention §4: All lemmas include Used in: tags
- Convention §5: NOT APPLICABLE (uniform oracle bound)

Used in: main convergence result for non-smooth convex stochastic optimization
-/

open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
open scoped InnerProductSpace

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

-- ============================================================================
-- SubgradientSetup: NO gradF field (non-smooth objective)
-- ============================================================================
/-- Complete setup for stochastic subgradient method.
Critical distinction: contains NO `gradF` field (non-smooth objective has no gradient).
Includes oracle measurability `hgL` as structure field (Convention §2). -/
structure SubgradientSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  w₀ : E
  η : ℕ → ℝ
  gradL : E → S → E
  ξ : ℕ → Ω → S
  P : Measure Ω
  hP : IsProbabilityMeasure P
  hξ_meas : ∀ t, Measurable (ξ t)
  hξ_indep : iIndepFun (β := fun _ => S) ξ P
  hξ_ident : ∀ t, IdentDistrib (ξ t) (ξ 0) P P
  hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry gradL)

/-- Self-contained recursive process definition for subgradient method (Archetype B). -/
noncomputable def SubgradientSetup.process (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω) : ℕ → Ω → E
  | 0 => fun _ => setup.w₀
  | t + 1 => fun ω => 
      let w_t := process setup t ω
      w_t - setup.η t • setup.gradL w_t (setup.ξ t ω)

namespace SubgradientSetup

variable (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω)

@[simp]
theorem process_zero : process setup 0 = fun _ => setup.w₀ := by
  sorry
@[simp]
theorem process_succ (t : ℕ) : process setup (t + 1) = fun ω => process setup t ω - setup.η t • setup.gradL (process setup t ω) (setup.ξ t ω) := by
  sorry

end SubgradientSetup

-- ============================================================================
-- Convergence theorem (PRIMITIVE FORM — NO abstract subdifferential symbols)
-- ============================================================================
/-- Convex convergence for stochastic subgradient method (primitive inequality form).
Archetype B: novel proof structure bypassing Layer 1 meta-theorems.
Uses primitive subgradient condition: ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ
Derives variance bound internally from uniform oracle bound (Pattern I).
Used in: main result for non-smooth convex stochastic optimization (this file) -/
theorem subgradient_convergence_convex
    (setup : SubgradientSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {G η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    -- PRIMITIVE SUBGRADIENT CONDITION (replaces abstract subdifferential membership):
    (hsubgrad : ∀ w s y, f y ≥ f w + ⟪setup.gradL w s, y - w⟫_ℝ)
    (hbounded : ∀ w s, ‖setup.gradL w s‖ ≤ G)
    (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hη : ∀ t, setup.η t = η)
    (T : ℕ) (hT : 0 < T)
    (h_int_f : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => f (setup.process t ω)) setup.P)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.P)
    (h_int_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.P) :
    (1 / (T : ℝ)) * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T,
        (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
      ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 / (2 * η * T) + η * G ^ 2 / 2 := by
  -- Pointwise inequality from norm expansion and subgradient condition
    have h_pointwise : ∀ (t : ℕ) (ω : Ω),
        f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar ≤
          (‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) / (2 * η) + η * G ^ 2 / 2 := by
      intro t ω
      set w_t := setup.process t ω with hw_t
      set w_t1 := setup.process (t + 1) ω with hw_t1
      set g_t := setup.gradL w_t (setup.ξ t ω) with hg_t

      -- Step relation: w_{t+1} = w_t - η • g_t
      have h_step : w_t1 = w_t - η • g_t := by
        rw [SubgradientSetup.process_succ, hw_t, hg_t, hη t]
        <;> simp

      -- Norm expansion: ‖w_{t+1} - w*‖² = ‖w_t - w*‖² - 2η⟪g_t, w_t - w*⟫ + η²‖g_t‖²
      have h_norm : ‖w_t1 - wStar‖ ^ 2 = ‖w_t - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪g_t, w_t - wStar⟫ + η ^ 2 * ‖g_t‖ ^ 2 := by
        calc
          ‖w_t1 - wStar‖ ^ 2 = ‖w_t - η • g_t - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by rw [h_step]
          _ = ‖(w_t - wStar) - η • g_t‖ ^ 2 := by abel
          _ = ‖w_t - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * ⟪w_t - wStar, η • g_t⟫ + ‖η • g_t‖ ^ 2 := by
            rw [norm_sub_sq_real]
          _ = ‖w_t - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪g_t, w_t - wStar⟫ + η ^ 2 * ‖g_t‖ ^ 2 := by
            simp [inner_smul_right, inner_comm, norm_smul, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_of_nonneg (le_of_lt hη_pos)]
            <;> ring_nf

      -- Subgradient inequality: ⟪g_t, w_t - w*⟫ ≥ f(w_t) - f(w*)
      have h_sub : ⟪g_t, w_t - wStar⟫ ≥ f w_t - f wStar := by
        have := hsubgrad w_t (setup.ξ t ω) wStar
        have : ⟪g_t, wStar - w_t⟫ = -⟪g_t, w_t - wStar⟫ := by
          rw [inner_sub_right]
          <;> simp [inner_comm]
          <;> ring
        linarith

      -- Gradient bound: ‖g_t‖² ≤ G²
      have h_g_bound : ‖g_t‖ ^ 2 ≤ G ^ 2 := by
        have : ‖g_t‖ ≤ G := hbounded w_t (setup.ξ t ω)
        exact pow_le_pow_of_le_left (norm_nonneg _) this 2

      -- Combine to get: ‖w_{t+1} - w*‖² ≤ ‖w_t - w*‖² - 2η(f(w_t) - f(w*)) + η²G²
      have h_main : ‖w_t1 - wStar‖ ^ 2 ≤ ‖w_t - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * (f w_t - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * G ^ 2 := by
        calc
          ‖w_t1 - wStar‖ ^ 2 = ‖w_t - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪g_t, w_t - wStar⟫ + η ^ 2 * ‖g_t‖ ^ 2 := h_norm
          _ ≤ ‖w_t - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * (f w_t - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * ‖g_t‖ ^ 2 := by
            gcongr <;> linarith
          _ ≤ ‖w_t - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * (f w_t - f wStar) + η ^ 2 * G ^ 2 := by
            gcongr <;> nlinarith

      -- Rearrange to isolate f(w_t) - f(w*)
      have h_final : f w_t - f wStar ≤ (‖w_t - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖w_t1 - wStar‖ ^ 2) / (2 * η) + η * G ^ 2 / 2 := by
        have : 2 * η * (f w_t - f wStar) ≤ ‖w_t - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖w_t1 - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * G ^ 2 := by linarith
        have : 0 < 2 * η := by linarith
        have : f w_t - f wStar ≤ (‖w_t - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖w_t1 - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * G ^ 2) / (2 * η) := by
          rw [le_div_iff this]
          exact this
        calc
          f w_t - f wStar ≤ (‖w_t - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖w_t1 - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η ^ 2 * G ^ 2) / (2 * η) := this
          _ = (‖w_t - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖w_t1 - wStar‖ ^ 2) / (2 * η) + η * G ^ 2 / 2 := by
            field_simp [hη_pos.ne']
            <;> ring_nf

      rw [hw_t, hw_t1]
      exact h_final

    -- Integrate the pointwise inequality for each t
    have h_integrated : ∀ t, (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
        (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) / (2 * η) + η * G ^ 2 / 2 := by
      intro t
      have h₁ : ∫ ω, (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ∂setup.P = ∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar := by
        rw [integral_sub_const setup.P (h_int_f t)]
        <;> simp [setup.P]
      have h₂ : ∫ ω, (f (setup.process t ω) - f wStar) ∂setup.P ≤
          ∫ ω, ((‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) / (2 * η) + η * G ^ 2 / 2) ∂setup.P := by
        apply integral_mono_on_AE setup.P
        · intro ω
          exact h_pointwise t ω
        · apply Measurable.sub
          · exact h_int_f t
          · exact measurable_const
        · apply Measurable.add
          · apply Measurable.div
            · apply Measurable.sub
              · exact h_int_norm_sq t
              · exact h_int_norm_sq (t + 1)
            · exact measurable_const
          · exact measurable_const
      have h₃ : ∫ ω, ((‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 - ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) / (2 * η) + η * G ^ 2 / 2) ∂setup.P =
          (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) / (2 * η) + η * G ^ 2 / 2 := by
        rw [integral_add (h_int_norm_sq t) (h_int_norm_sq (t + 1))]
        rw [integral_sub_const setup.P (h_int_norm_sq (t + 1))]
        rw [div_eq_mul_inv]
        rw [integral_mul_const setup.P (h_int_norm_sq t)]
        rw [integral_mul_const setup.P (h_int_norm_sq (t + 1))]
        <;> field_simp [hη_pos.ne']
        <;> ring_nf
      linarith

    -- Sum over t ∈ {0, ..., T-1}
    have h_sum : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
        ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ((∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) / (2 * η) + η * G ^ 2 / 2) := by
      apply Finset.sum_le_sum
      intro t ht
      exact h_integrated t

    -- Telescope the sum on the right-hand side
    have h_telescope : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ((∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) / (2 * η) + η * G ^ 2 / 2) =
        (∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) / (2 * η) + T * (η * G ^ 2 / 2) := by
      calc
        _ = ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ((∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) / (2 * η)) +
            ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (η * G ^ 2 / 2) := by
          rw [Finset.sum_add_distrib]
        _ = (∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P)) / (2 * η) +
            T * (η * G ^ 2 / 2) := by
          rw [Finset.sum_div]
          rw [Finset.sum_const]
          <;> simp [hT]
          <;> field_simp [hη_pos.ne']
        _ = (∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) / (2 * η) +
            T * (η * G ^ 2 / 2) := by
          have : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) =
              ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
            calc
              _ = ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
                rw [Finset.sum_sub_distrib]

                congr 1
                apply Finset.sum_bij' (fun t _ => t + 1) (fun t _ => t - 1)
                · intro t ht
                  simp only [Finset.mem_Ico, Nat.lt_succ_iff]

                · intro t ht
                  simp only [Finset.mem_Ico, Nat.lt_succ_iff]
                  omega
                · intro t ht
                  simp
                · intro t ht
                  simp
                · intro t ht
                  simp
              _ = ∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P := by
                simp [Finset.sum_range_succ']
                <;> ring_nf
          rw [this]

    -- Combine inequalities
    have h_combined : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
        (∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) / (2 * η) + T * (η * G ^ 2 / 2) := by
      calc
        _ ≤ ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, ((∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) / (2 * η) + η * G ^ 2 / 2) := h_sum
        _ = (∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) / (2 * η) + T * (η * G ^ 2 / 2) := by rw [h_telescope]

    -- Drop the negative term ‖w_T - w*‖²
    have h_drop : (∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P - ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) / (2 * η) ≤
        (∫ ω, ‖setup.process 0 ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P) / (2 * η) := by
      apply sub_le_sub_right
      apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_of_le_mul
      · exact zero_le_two_mul hη_pos
      · apply integral_nonneg
        intro ω
        exact sq_nonneg _
